title_zh: ChatGPT 的預排任務
summary_en: Today we’re rolling out a beta version of tasks—a new way to ask ChatGPT to do things for you at a future time. Whether it's one-time reminders or recurring actions, tell ChatGPT what you need and when, and it will automatically take care of it. Scheduled tasks is in early beta for Plus, Pro, and Teams. Eventually this will be available to anyone with a ChatGPT account. For details see Scheduled tasks in ChatGPT.
summary_zh: 我們今日推出預排任務的測試版本，讓 ChatGPT 能在未來為您執行任務。無論是一次性提醒或重複性操作，只需告知 ChatGPT 需求與時間，系統將自動處理。預排任務目前正於 Plus、Pro 及 Teams 方案中進行早期測試。

title_zh: 從聊天視窗匯入至 Canvas
summary_en: Edit a full model response in Canvas Edit a code block in Canvas Web only (no desktop or mobile in this release).
summary_zh: 在 Canvas 中編輯完整的模型回應，或在 Canvas 中編輯程式碼區塊。僅限網頁版（本版本不支援桌面版或行動版）。

title_zh: 自訂指令中的更多個人化設定
summary_en: We've updated custom instructions to make it easier to customize how ChatGPT responds to you. With the new UI, you can tell ChatGPT the traits you want it to have, how you want it to talk to you, and any rules you want it to follow. If you're already using custom instructions, this won't change your current settings. The new UI is rolling out now on http://chatgpt.com and desktop on Windows, and is coming to mobile and desktop on MacOS in the next few weeks. Available soon to ChatGPT users in the EU, Norway, Iceland, Liechtenstein, and Switzerland.
summary_zh: 我們更新了自訂指令，讓使用者能更輕鬆地設定 ChatGPT 的回應方式。透過新介面，您可以設定希望 ChatGPT 具備的特質、對話語氣，以及需遵循的任何規則。若您已在使用自訂指令，此更新不會變更您目前的設定。

title_zh: 推出 Operator
summary_en: OpenAI released Operator as a U.S. research preview for ChatGPT Pro: an agent powered by the Computer-Using Agent model that can use its own browser to type, click, scroll, and perform web tasks under user control.
summary_zh: OpenAI 針對 ChatGPT Pro 在美國推出 Operator 研究預覽版。這是一個由「電腦使用代理模型」(Computer-Using Agent model) 驅動的代理，能在使用者控制下，利用自身瀏覽器進行輸入、點擊、捲動及執行網路任務。

title_zh: 推出 OpenAI o3-mini
summary_en: OpenAI released o3-mini, a cost-efficient reasoning model optimized for coding, math, and science, to ChatGPT Free and paid plans and the API.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 o3-mini，這是一款針對程式撰寫、數學及科學進行最佳化的具成本效益推理模型，並提供予 ChatGPT 免費版、付費方案以及 API 使用。

title_zh: 推出 Deep Research
summary_en: OpenAI launched deep research in ChatGPT for multi-step web research that finds, analyzes, and synthesizes many online sources into cited reports; the initial rollout began with Pro users.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 Deep Research，用於進行多步驟網路研究，能搜尋、分析並整合多項線上來源，彙整成附註引用的報告；初期先向 Pro 使用者開放。

title_en: Deep research expands to the UK, Switzerland, and EEA
title_zh: Deep Research 擴展至英國、瑞士及歐洲經濟區
summary_en: OpenAI expanded deep research access to Pro users in the United Kingdom, Switzerland, and the European Economic Area.
summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Deep Research 的使用權限擴展至英國、瑞士及歐洲經濟區 (EEA) 的 Pro 使用者。

title_zh: Canvas 分享功能
summary_en: Users can now share a Canvas asset such as rendered React/HTML code, document, or code with another user, similar to how you share a conversation. You can do this from the Canvas toolbar when Canvas is open. For more details about the canvas feature in ChatGPT, check out the following Help Center article!
summary_zh: 使用者現可與他人分享 Canvas 資產（例如已渲染的 React/HTML 程式碼、文件或程式碼），方式與分享對話類似。當 Canvas 開啟時，可透過工具列執行此操作。如需關於 ChatGPT Canvas 功能的更多詳細資訊，請查看說明中心文章。

title_en: Deep research expands to ChatGPT Plus
title_zh: Deep Research 擴展至 ChatGPT Plus
summary_en: OpenAI expanded deep research from Pro to all ChatGPT Plus users.
summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Deep Research 從 Pro 方案擴展至所有 ChatGPT Plus 使用者。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-4.5
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-4.5 as a research preview and its largest chat model at the time, initially worldwide for ChatGPT Pro with other paid plans to follow.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-4.5 作為研究預覽版，這是當時其最大的聊天模型，初期先向全球 ChatGPT Pro 使用者開放，後續將陸續擴展至其他付費方案。

title_zh: Android 應用程式
summary_en: 1. Increased the default size for in‐line generated images. 2. More clear and private Incognito keyboard for Temporary Chats.
summary_zh: 1. 增加內嵌生成影像的預設大小。2. 為臨時對話提供更清晰、隱私的無痕鍵盤。

title_zh: 訊息錯誤重試功能
summary_en: ChatGPT web and Windows added inline retry controls so users can retry a failed response or continue the same conversation.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版與 Windows 版新增內嵌重試控制項，讓使用者能針對失敗的回應進行重試，或繼續進行相同的對話。

title_zh: 更顯眼的 Windows 隨附視窗
summary_en: The Windows desktop companion window became easier to invoke and use alongside other applications.
summary_zh: Windows 桌面隨附視窗現在更易於呼叫，並能與其他應用程式並行使用。

title_en: Python data analysis for o1 and o3-mini
title_zh: o1 與 o3-mini 的 Python 資料分析功能
summary_en: The o1 and o3-mini models gained Python-powered data analysis in ChatGPT for regressions, visualizations, and scenario simulations.
summary_zh: o1 與 o3-mini 模型在 ChatGPT 中獲得基於 Python 的資料分析能力，可用於迴歸分析、視覺化與情境模擬。

title_zh: iOS 應用程式
summary_en: 1. Improved table-copying functionality out of ChatGPT responses on iOS and macOS. 2. Added long press on your message to open menu actions: Copy, Edit. 3. Improved response display of nested blockquote content. 4. Improved display and faster streaming of conversations and message menu actions.
summary_zh: 1. 改進 iOS 與 macOS 上 ChatGPT 回應的表格複製功能。2. 新增訊息長按選單操作：複製、編輯。3. 改進巢狀引用內容的回應顯示方式。4. 改進對話的顯示與訊息選單操作的串流速度。

title_zh: 推出 4o 影像生成功能
summary_en: OpenAI integrated native image generation into GPT-4o, adding stronger text rendering, detailed instruction following, in-context image editing, and multi-turn refinement in ChatGPT.
summary_zh: OpenAI 將原生影像生成整合至 GPT-4o，在 ChatGPT 中增加了更強的文字渲染、細緻的指令遵循、上下文影像編輯以及多輪修正功能。

title_zh: GPT-4o 的改進
summary_en: We’ve made improvements to GPT-4o—it now feels more intuitive, creative, and collaborative, with enhanced instruction-following, smarter coding capabilities, and a clearer communication style. GPT-4o has further improved its capability to tackle complex technical and coding problems. It now generates cleaner, simpler frontend code, more accurately thinks through existing code to identify necessary changes, and consistently produces coding outputs that successfully compile and run, streamlining your coding workflows.…
summary_zh: 我們對 GPT-4o 進行了改進——它現在使用起來更直觀、具備更多創意與協作性，並增強了指令遵循能力、更聰明的程式開發功能，以及更清晰的溝通風格。GPT-4o 進一步提升了處理複雜技術與程式開發問題的能力……

title_zh: 宣佈 GPT-4 將於 ChatGPT 中退役
summary_en: OpenAI announced that GPT-4 would be retired from ChatGPT on April 30, 2025 and replaced by GPT-4o; GPT-4 remained available in the API.
summary_zh: OpenAI 宣佈 GPT-4 將於 2025 年 4 月 30 日從 ChatGPT 退役，並由 GPT-4o 取代；GPT-4 仍可在 API 中使用。

title_zh: ChatGPT 影像庫
summary_en: All images you create with ChatGPT are now automatically saved to a new Library in the sidebar, giving you one place to browse, revisit, and reuse your work without digging through past conversations. The Library is rolling out today on Web, iOS, and Android for Free, Plus, and Pro users (Enterprise / Edu support coming soon). For now, it displays images generated with 4o Image Generation while we backfill older creations, and you can remove an image by deleting the conversation where it was made.
summary_zh: 所有您使用 ChatGPT 建立的影像現在都會自動儲存到側邊欄的新「影像庫」中，讓您能在一處瀏覽、回顧並重複使用您的作品，無需翻找過往的對話紀錄。此影像庫今日於網頁版、iOS 與 Android 平台上向 Free、Plus 與 Pro 使用者推出（企業版/教育版支援即將推出）……

title_zh: 具備搜尋功能的記憶功能
summary_en: ChatGPT can also use memories to inform search queries when ChatGPT searches the web using third-party search providers. Learn more about search.
summary_zh: 當 ChatGPT 使用第三方搜尋供應商進行網頁搜尋時，也能運用記憶資訊來優化搜尋查詢。進一步了解搜尋功能。

title_zh: OpenAI o3 在 ChatGPT 中推出
summary_en: OpenAI released o3 in ChatGPT as a reasoning model for complex coding, math, science, and visual-analysis tasks, with access to ChatGPT tools.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 o3，這是一個用於複雜程式開發、數學、科學和視覺分析任務的推理模型，並可使用 ChatGPT 工具。

title_zh: OpenAI o4-mini 在 ChatGPT 中推出
summary_en: OpenAI released o4-mini in ChatGPT as a smaller, faster, cost-efficient reasoning model with high usage limits and strong math, coding, and visual performance.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出 o4-mini，這是一個更小、更快、且具成本效益的推理模型，具有高使用限制以及強大的數學、程式開發和視覺效能。

title_en: Deep research usage expands with a lightweight model
title_zh: 深度研究使用範圍擴大，增加輕量級模型
summary_en: OpenAI increased deep research limits and added a lightweight version powered by a variant of o4-mini, with automatic fallback after full-model limits are reached.
summary_zh: OpenAI 增加了深度研究的使用限制，並加入了由 o4-mini 變體驅動的輕量級版本，在達到完整模型限制後會自動切換。

title_zh: GPT-4o 的改進
summary_en: We’re making additional improvements to GPT-4o, optimizing when it saves memories and enhancing problem-solving capabilities for STEM. We’ve also made subtle changes to the way it responds, making it more proactive and better at guiding conversations toward productive outcomes. We think these updates help GPT-4o feel more intuitive and effective across a variety of tasks–we hope you agree!
summary_zh: 我們對 GPT-4o 進行了額外改進，優化了記憶保存時機，並增強了 STEM 的問題解決能力。我們也對其回應方式做了細微調整，使其更主動，並能更好地引導對話產生有效成果。

title_zh: GPT-4o 更新
summary_en: We've reverted the most recent update to GPT-4o due to issues with overly agreeable responses (sycophancy). We’re actively working on further improvements. For more details, check out our blog post explaining what happened and our initial findings, and this blog post where we expand on what we missed with sycophancy and the changes we're going to make going forward.
summary_zh: 由於 GPT-4o 的近期更新出現過度順從回應（諂媚）的問題，我們已將其撤回。我們正積極致力於進一步的改進。

title_zh: 停用 Monday GPT
summary_en: Launched on April 1 as a one-month surprise, our “Monday” personality (available in both voice and text) has now been sunset. We hope you enjoyed Monday's irreverent style, and we’re already working on new personalities for future use. Please stay tuned for what’s next!
summary_zh: 作為 4 月 1 日推出的為期一個月的驚喜，我們的「Monday」個性（提供語音和文字版本）現已停用。希望您喜歡 Monday 不拘一格的風格，我們已經在為未來開發新的個性。請持續關注後續內容！

title_en: Mobile UI (iOS/Android) changing on Free/Plus/Pro plans
title_zh: 免費版/Plus/Pro 方案的行動版 UI (iOS/Android) 變更
summary_en: We've removed the row of individual tool icons from the mobile composer and replaces it with the new sliders‑style icon to open the Skills menu; tapping that button opens a bottom‑sheet menu where users can choose tools like Create an image or Search the web. No tools are deprecated—access is simply consolidated to clear space and reduce on‑screen clutter.
summary_zh: 我們移除了行動版編輯器中的工具圖示列，並以新的滑桿樣式圖示取代，用於開啟「技能」選單；點擊該按鈕會開啟底部工作表選單，使用者可選擇如「建立影像」或「搜尋網路」等工具。沒有工具被停用，存取方式僅被整合以騰出空間並減少畫面雜亂。

title_en: Enhanced Memory in ChatGPT (including EU) on Plus/Pro
title_zh: ChatGPT Plus/Pro 的增強記憶功能（包含歐盟）
summary_en: Enhanced memory rolling out to all Plus and Pro users (including the EU). The new memory features are available in the EEA (EU + UK), Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, or Liechtenstein. These features are OFF by default and must be enabled in Settings > Personalization > Reference Chat History. • Saved memories and Chat history are offered only to Plus and Pro accounts. • Free‑tier users have access to Saved memories only. • Outside the European regions listed above, all Plus and Pro accounts that have memory enabled will receive the upgrade automatically.…
summary_zh: 增強記憶功能正向所有 Plus 和 Pro 使用者（包含歐盟）推出。新的記憶功能適用於 EEA（歐盟 + 英國）、瑞士、挪威、冰島或列支敦斯登。這些功能預設為關閉，必須在「設定 > 個人化 > 參照對話記錄」中啟用。

title_en: GitHub connector for deep research for Plus/Pro/Team
title_zh: 適用於 Plus/Pro/Team 的深度研究 GitHub 連接器
summary_en: ChatGPT deep research with GitHub is available globally to Team users. It is also gradually rolling out to Plus and Pro users, except for those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Enterprise user access will be announced at a later date. See: Connecting GitHub to ChatGPT deep research.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 深度研究與 GitHub 的整合已向全球 Team 使用者開放。該功能也正逐步向 Plus 和 Pro 使用者推出，但 EEA、瑞士和英國的使用者除外。企業使用者存取權限將於稍後公布。請參閱：將 GitHub 連接到 ChatGPT 深度研究。

title_en: Export Deep Research as PDF for Plus/Pro/Team
title_zh: 將深度研究匯出為 PDF（適用於 Plus/Pro/Team）
summary_en: You can now export your deep research reports as well-formatted PDFs—complete with tables, images, linked citations, and sources. To use, click the share icon and select 'Download as PDF.' It works for both new and past reports.
summary_zh: 您現在可以將深度研究報告匯出為格式良好的 PDF，其中包含表格、影像、連結的引用和來源。使用方法：點擊分享圖示並選擇「下載為 PDF」。此功能適用於新的和過去的報告。

title_en: Microsoft Sharepoint and OneDrive connector for deep research for Plus/Pro/Team
title_zh: 針對 Plus/Pro/Team 的 ChatGPT 深度研究 Microsoft SharePoint 與 OneDrive 連接器
summary_en: ChatGPT deep research with Sharepoint and OneDrive is available globally to Team users. It is also gradually rolling out to Plus and Pro users, except for those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Enterprise user access will be announced at a later date. See: Connecting SharePoint and Microsoft OneDrive to ChatGPT deep research
summary_zh: 支援 SharePoint 與 OneDrive 的 ChatGPT 深度研究功能已開放給全球 Team 用戶使用。該功能也正逐步推廣至 Plus 與 Pro 用戶（不含歐洲經濟區、瑞士與英國）。企業用戶的存取權限將於日後另行公告。參考：將 SharePoint 與 Microsoft OneDrive 連接到 ChatGPT 深度研究

title_en: Introducing GPT-4.1 mini, replacing GPT-4o mini, in ChatGPT for all users
title_zh: 推出 GPT-4.1 mini，取代 ChatGPT 中所有用戶的 GPT-4o mini
summary_en: GPT-4.1 mini is a fast, capable, and efficient small model, delivering significant improvements compared to GPT-4o mini—in instruction-following, coding, and overall intelligence. Starting today, GPT-4.1 mini replaces GPT-4o mini in the model picker under "more models" for paid users, and will serve as the fallback model for free users once they reach their GPT-4o usage limits. Rate limits remain the same. Evals for GPT-4.1 and GPT-4.1 mini were originally shared in the blog post accompanying their API release.…
summary_zh: GPT-4.1 mini 是一款快速、強大且高效的小型模型，相較於 GPT-4o mini 在指令遵循、程式編寫及整體智慧能力上有顯著提升……

title_en: Releasing GPT-4.1 in ChatGPT for all paid users
title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中為所有付費用戶推出 GPT-4.1
summary_en: Since its launch in the API in April, GPT-4.1 has become a favorite among developers—by popular demand, we’re making it available directly in ChatGPT. GPT-4.1 is a specialized model that excels at coding tasks. Compared to GPT-4o, it's even stronger at precise instruction following and web development tasks, and offers an alternative to OpenAI o3 and OpenAI o4-mini for simpler, everyday coding needs. Starting today, Plus, Pro, and Team users can access GPT-4.1 via the "more models" dropdown in the model picker.…
summary_zh: 自四月於 API 推出以來，GPT-4.1 深受開發者喜愛，應廣大需求，我們現已將其直接導入 ChatGPT。GPT-4.1 是一款擅長程式編寫任務的專業模型……

title_en: Dropbox connector for deep research for Plus/Pro/Team
title_zh: 針對 Plus/Pro/Team 的 Dropbox 深度研究連接器
summary_en: ChatGPT deep research with Dropbox is available globally to Team users. It is also gradually rolling out to Plus and Pro users, except for those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Enterprise user access will be announced at a later date. See: Connect apps to ChatGPT deep research
summary_zh: 支援 Dropbox 的 ChatGPT 深度研究功能已開放給全球 Team 用戶使用。該功能也正逐步推廣至 Plus 與 Pro 用戶（不含歐洲經濟區、瑞士與英國）。企業用戶的存取權限將於日後另行公告。參考：將應用程式連接到 ChatGPT 深度研究

title_zh: 用於深度研究的 GitHub 連接器
summary_en: The GitHub connector is now available globally to Plus/Pro/Team users, including those in the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK.
summary_zh: GitHub 連接器現已向全球的 Plus/Pro/Team 用戶開放，包含歐洲經濟區、瑞士與英國的用戶。

title_zh: 推出 Codex
summary_en: OpenAI launched the Codex cloud software-engineering agent in research preview, powered by codex-1 and capable of working on multiple tasks in isolated cloud sandboxes.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Codex 雲端軟體工程代理的研究預覽版；它由 codex-1 驅動，可在隔離的雲端沙盒中同時處理多項任務。

title_en: Memory is now more comprehensive for Free users
title_zh: Memory 功能對免費版用戶更臻全面
summary_en: Memory improvements are starting to roll out to Free users. In addition to the saved memories that were there before, ChatGPT now references your recent conversations to deliver responses that feel more relevant and tailored to you. Free users must be logged in and on up-to-date apps (iOS/Android v1.2025.147+). Free users in EEA (EU + UK), Switzerland, Norway, Iceland, or Liechtenstein will see a prompt to enable this setting or can visit Settings > Personalization > Memory > Reference chat history to enable.…
summary_zh: Memory 功能的改進正陸續向免費版用戶推出。除了先前儲存的記憶外，ChatGPT 現在也會參考您近期的對話，以提供更相關且客製化的回應。免費版用戶需登入並使用最新版本的應用程式（iOS/Android v1.2025.147+）……

title_en: Connectors in beta for deep research (Plus, Pro, Team, Enterprise, Edu)
title_zh: 用於深度研究的連接器進入 Beta 測試階段（Plus、Pro、Team、Enterprise、Edu）
summary_en: ChatGPT Team, Enterprise, and Edu customers globally can use connectors in deep research, as well as Pro and Plus users (excluding users in Switzerland, EEA, and the UK) to generate long-form, cited responses that include your company’s internal tools. Supported connectors: Google Drive, SharePoint, Dropbox, Box, Outlook, Gmail, Google Calendar, Linear, GitHub, HubSpot, and Teams Combines internal + web sources for synthesis Learn more about Connectors in ChatGPT.
summary_zh: 全球的 ChatGPT Team、Enterprise 與 Edu 客戶，以及 Pro 與 Plus 用戶（不含瑞士、歐洲經濟區與英國的用戶），現可於深度研究功能中使用連接器，以生成包含貴公司內部工具資訊的長篇且附帶引用的回應……

title_en: Custom connectors via Model Context Protocol (Pro, Team, Enterprise, Edu)
title_zh: 透過 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 建立自訂連接器（Pro、Team、Enterprise、Edu）
summary_en: Admins and users can now build and deploy custom connectors to proprietary systems using Model Context Protocol (MCP). Requires a remote MCP server Available only in deep research Admin-published connectors appear in the connector list for all users Learn more about building custom connectors with MCP. For Team, Enterprise, and Edu plans, only admins can build and deploy custom connectors.
summary_zh: 管理員與使用者現在可以使用 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 建立並部署連接至專有系統的自訂連接器。需要遠端 MCP 伺服器，且僅限於深度研究功能中使用。管理員發佈的連接器將出現在所有用戶的連接器清單中。進一步了解如何使用 MCP 建立自訂連接器……

title_en: Updates to Advanced Voice Mode for paid users
title_zh: 為付費用戶更新高階語音模式 (Advanced Voice Mode)
summary_en: We're upgrading Advanced Voice in ChatGPT for paid users with significant enhancements in intonation and naturalness, making interactions feel more fluid and human-like. When we first launched Advanced Voice, it represented a leap forward in AI speech—now, it speaks even more naturally, with subtler intonation, realistic cadence (including pauses and emphases), and more on-point expressiveness for certain emotions including empathy, sarcasm, and more. Voice also now offers intuitive and effective language translation.…
summary_zh: 我們正在為 ChatGPT 付費用戶升級高階語音模式，在語調與自然度上有顯著增強，使互動感覺更流暢且擬人化……

title_en: Today, we're launching OpenAI o3-pro—available now for Pro users in ChatGPT and in our API.
title_zh: 今天，我們推出 OpenAI o3-pro—即日起於 ChatGPT 和 API 中開放給 Pro 使用者。
summary_en: Like o1-pro, o3-pro is a version of our most intelligent model, o3, designed to think longer and provide the most reliable responses. Since the launch of o1-pro, users have favored this model for domains such as math, science, and coding—areas where o3-pro continues to excel, as shown in academic evaluations. Like o3, o3-pro has access to tools that make ChatGPT useful—it can search the web, analyze files, reason about visual inputs, use Python, personalize responses using memory, and more.…
summary_zh: 如同 o1-pro，o3-pro 是我們最聰明模型 o3 的一個版本，旨在進行更長時間的思考並提供最可靠的回應。自 o1-pro 推出以來，使用者在數學、科學和程式設計等領域偏好此模型，而在學術評估中顯示，o3-pro 在這些領域持續表現優異……

title_zh: 為 Projects 增加更多功能
summary_en: Starting today, we’re adding several updates to projects in ChatGPT to help you do more focused work. These updates are available for Plus, Pro, and Team users. Deep research and voice mode support Improvements to memory to reference past chats in a project* Sharing chats from projects Starting a new project directly from a chat Upload files and access model selector on mobile Learn more about projects. *Memory improvements are available for Plus and Pro users.
summary_zh: 即日起，我們為 ChatGPT 中的 Projects 增加多項更新，協助您進行更專注的工作。這些更新適用於 Plus、Pro 和 Team 使用者……

title_en: Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
title_zh: 擴大 Custom GPTs 的模型支援
summary_en: Creators can now choose from the full set of ChatGPT models (GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini and more) when building Custom GPTs—making it easier to fine-tune performance for different tasks, industries, and workflows. Creators can also set a recommended model to guide users. Key details: GPTs without Custom Actions can use the model picker to select from all models available to the user. GPTs with Custom Actions currently support GPT-4o and 4.1 Available on web for users on Plus, Pro and Team plans. Enterprise and Edu rollout coming soon.
summary_zh: 創作者在建立 Custom GPTs 時，現在可以從完整的 ChatGPT 模型集合（GPT-4o、o3、o4-mini 等）中進行選擇，這讓調整針對不同任務、產業和工作流程的效能變得更加容易。創作者亦可設定推薦模型以引導使用者……

title_en: Improvements to the ChatGPT search response quality
title_zh: 提升 ChatGPT 搜尋回應品質
summary_en: We’ve upgraded ChatGPT search for all users to provide even more comprehensive, up-to-date responses. In testing, we found users preferred these search improvements over our previous search experience. Smarter responses that are more intelligent, are better at understanding what you’re asking, and provide more comprehensive answers. Handles longer conversational contexts, allowing better intelligence in longer conversations. More robust ability to follow instructions, especially in longer conversations, significantly reducing repetitive responses.…
summary_zh: 我們已升級所有使用者的 ChatGPT 搜尋功能，以提供更全面、即時的回應。在測試中，我們發現使用者更偏好這些搜尋改進，勝過先前的搜尋體驗。回應更聰明、更能理解您的提問，並提供更全面的答案……

title_en: Expanded Model Support for Custom GPTs
title_zh: 擴大 Custom GPTs 的模型支援
summary_en: Enterprise and Edu users can also now choose from the full set of ChatGPT models (GPT-4o, o3, o4-mini and more) when building Custom GPTs. This was launched to Plus, Pro and Team users earlier this month. Key details: GPTs without Custom Actions can use the model picker to select from all models available to the user. GPTs with Custom Actions currently support GPT-4o and 4.1 Available on web for users on all paid plans (Plus, Pro Team, Enterprise, Edu).
summary_zh: Enterprise 和 Edu 使用者現在在建立 Custom GPTs 時，也能從完整的 ChatGPT 模型集合（GPT-4o、o3、o4-mini 等）中進行選擇。此功能已於本月初對 Plus、Pro 和 Team 使用者推出。關鍵細節：沒有 Custom Actions 的 GPTs 可以使用模型選擇器，從使用者可用的所有模型中進行選擇……

title_zh: ChatGPT 錄音模式
summary_en: Capture meetings, brainstorms, or voice notes. Launching today for Pro, Enterprise, and Edu users. Previously launched for Team users on June 4, 2025. ChatGPT will transcribe, summarize, and turn them into helpful outputs like follow-ups, plans, or even code. Available on the macOS desktop app only. Learn more about ChatGPT Record.
summary_zh: 捕捉會議、腦力激盪或語音筆記。即日起對 Pro、Enterprise 和 Edu 使用者推出。先前已於 2025 年 6 月 4 日對 Team 使用者推出。ChatGPT 將對其進行轉錄、摘要，並將其轉化為有用的產出，例如後續行動、計畫，甚至是程式碼。僅適用於 macOS 桌面應用程式。深入了解 ChatGPT Record。

title_zh: 聊天搜尋連接器 (Pro)
summary_en: Pro users are now able to use chat search connectors (in addition to deep research connectors) for the following integrations: Dropbox, Box, Google Drive (synced and non-synced), Microsoft OneDrive (Business), Microsoft SharePoint. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about Connectors.
summary_zh: Pro 使用者現在可以使用聊天搜尋連接器（除深度研究連接器外）進行以下整合：Dropbox、Box、Google Drive（同步與非同步）、Microsoft OneDrive (Business)、Microsoft SharePoint。請注意，此功能目前僅限於位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士和英國以外的使用者使用……

title_zh: Project 檔案限制增加 (Pro)
summary_en: Projects can now support 40 uploaded files, up from 20, for Pro users.
summary_zh: 對於 Pro 使用者，Projects 現在支援 40 個上傳檔案，從 20 個增加。

title_en: Record mode in ChatGPT macOS desktop app (Plus)
title_zh: ChatGPT macOS 桌面應用程式中的錄音模式 (Plus)
summary_en: Record mode is now available to ChatGPT Plus users globally in the macOS desktop app. Record live conversations like team meetings or voice notes, and turn those into an editable summary in canvas. Available on the macOS desktop app only. Learn more about record mode. Note: Record mode originally rolled out to Team users on June 4, and Enterprise & Edu plans on June 18.
summary_zh: 錄音模式即日起全球對 ChatGPT Plus 使用者在 macOS 桌面應用程式中開放。錄製現場對話（如團隊會議或語音筆記），並將其轉化為 canvas 中的可編輯摘要。僅適用於 macOS 桌面應用程式。深入了解錄音模式……

title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT agent
summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT agent for Pro, Plus, and Team, combining web interaction, deep research, connected sources, terminal use, and editable artifacts in a user-supervised virtual computer.
summary_zh: OpenAI 為 Pro、Plus 和 Team 使用者推出 ChatGPT agent，結合網頁互動、深度研究、已連結來源、終端機使用以及可編輯的產出物，並在使用者監督的虛擬電腦中運作。

title_zh: 宣佈終止 Operator 獨立體驗
summary_en: With Operator functionality integrated into ChatGPT agent, OpenAI announced that the standalone Operator experience at operator.chatgpt.com would be deprecated in the following weeks.
summary_zh: 隨著 Operator 功能整合至 ChatGPT agent，OpenAI 宣佈 operator.chatgpt.com 上的獨立 Operator 體驗將於未來幾週內終止。

title_en: Updates to Advanced Voice Mode for Free tier users
title_zh: 免費版用戶的進階語音模式更新
summary_en: The Advanced Voice upgrades we announced on June 7th are now rolling out to ChatGPT free users too. With the same improvements available to paid users, ChatGPT sounds more natural and expressive, and can translate more effectively. Rate limits for free users stay the same.
summary_zh: 我們於 6 月 7 日宣佈的進階語音升級現已向 ChatGPT 免費版用戶開放。透過與付費版用戶相同的改進，ChatGPT 聽起來更自然、更具表現力，且能更有效地進行翻譯。免費版用戶的速率限制保持不變。

title_zh: Canva 與 Notion 連接器 (Pro)
summary_en: Pro users can now connect to Canva and Notion for both chat search and deep research. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about connectors.
summary_zh: Pro 用戶現可連接至 Canva 與 Notion，以進行聊天搜尋與深度研究。請注意，此功能目前僅限位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士及英國以外的用戶使用。瞭解更多關於連接器的資訊。

title_en: Chat search for HubSpot and custom connectors (MCP) (Pro)
title_zh: HubSpot 與自訂連接器 (MCP) 的聊天搜尋 (Pro)
summary_en: Pro users can now utilize chat search with HubSpot and custom connectors (MCP) in addition to deep research. Note this feature is currently limited to users located outside of the EEA, Switzerland, and the UK. Learn more about connectors, as well as how to create a custom connector using MCP.
summary_zh: Pro 用戶除深度研究外，現亦可將聊天搜尋用於 HubSpot 與自訂連接器 (MCP)。請注意，此功能目前僅限位於歐洲經濟區 (EEA)、瑞士及英國以外的用戶使用。瞭解更多關於連接器，以及如何使用 MCP 建立自訂連接器的資訊。

title_zh: 學習模式
summary_en: Study mode is currently available to users in Free, Plus, Pro, and Teams plans globally and will expand to Edu plans in the coming weeks. Study mode works with any model available in ChatGPT on iOS, Android, web, and desktop. Study mode is a new learning experience in ChatGPT designed to help you build a deeper understanding of any topic. When you turn it on, ChatGPT will ask interactive questions to understand your goals and skill level, then work with you to reach the answer together.…
summary_zh: 學習模式目前向全球 Free、Plus、Pro 及 Teams 方案的用戶開放，並將於未來幾週內擴展至 Edu 方案。學習模式適用於 ChatGPT 在 iOS、Android、網頁及桌面版上提供的任何模型。學習模式是 ChatGPT 中的一項新學習體驗，旨在協助您對任何主題建立更深刻的理解。

title_zh: 推出 gpt-oss-120b 與 gpt-oss-20b
summary_en: OpenAI released two Apache 2.0 open-weight text reasoning models for teams to run and customize on their own infrastructure or hosting providers.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出兩個採用 Apache 2.0 授權的開放權重文字推理模型，供團隊在其自有基礎設施或託管服務供應商上執行並自訂。

title_zh: 強調色
summary_en: You can now set an accent color that applies to elements in ChatGPT, including your conversation bubbles, the Voice button, and highlighted text. On web: Click your profile icon at the bottom left, select Settings, go to the General tab, and choose an option from the Accent color drop-down. On mobile (iOS and Android): Tap your profile icon at the bottom, go to Personalization, then select Color Scheme to pick your accent color.
summary_zh: 您現在可以設定適用於 ChatGPT 中各項元素的強調色，包括對話氣泡、語音按鈕及反白文字。在網頁版上：點擊左下角的個人資料圖示，選取「設定」，前往「一般」頁籤，並從「強調色」下拉式選單中選擇選項。

title_en: Expanded ChatGPT Voice access and custom GPT support
title_zh: 擴展 ChatGPT 語音存取與自訂 GPT 支援
summary_en: Voice Mode added custom GPT support, near-unlimited use for Plus, and hours of daily use for Free users.
summary_zh: 語音模式新增自訂 GPT 支援，Plus 用戶可享有近乎無限的使用量，免費版用戶則享有每日數小時的使用量。

title_zh: GPT-5
summary_en: GPT-5 is slowly rolling out to all users on ChatGPT Plus, Pro, Team, and Free plans worldwide across web, mobile, and desktop. GPT-5 will be available to ChatGPT Enterprise and Edu plans soon. GPT-5 in ChatGPT is our next flagship model and the new default for all logged-in users. It simplifies ChatGPT to a single auto-switching system that brings together the best of our previous models into a smart, fast model. GPT-5 is available to all ChatGPT Tiers.…
summary_zh: GPT-5 正逐步向全球網頁、行動裝置及桌面版 ChatGPT Plus、Pro、Team 及 Free 方案的所有用戶推出。GPT-5 將於近期向 ChatGPT Enterprise 及 Edu 方案提供。ChatGPT 中的 GPT-5 是我們的新一代旗艦模型，也是所有已登入用戶的新預設模型。

title_zh: 個性
summary_en: You can now choose from four distinct personalities or use the Default personality in your Customize ChatGPT settings. Default is the standard ChatGPT style: clear, neutral, and adaptable. The other personalities each have their own style and tone, described below. Cynic – Sarcastic and dry, delivers blunt help with wit. Often teases, but provides direct, practical answers when it matters. Robot – Precise, efficient, and emotionless, delivering direct answers without extra words.…
summary_zh: 您現在可以在「自訂 ChatGPT」設定中，從四種不同的個性中選擇，或使用「預設」個性。「預設」為標準的 ChatGPT 風格：清晰、中立且具適應性。其他個性各有其風格與語氣，說明如下。Cynic (憤世嫉俗) – 諷刺且冷漠，以機智提供直率的協助。

title_zh: 宣佈淘汰標準語音模式
summary_en: OpenAI announced that Standard Voice Mode would be retired in 30 days, moving users to the newer unified Voice experience.
summary_zh: OpenAI 宣佈標準語音模式將於 30 天后淘汰，並將使用者遷移至較新的統一語音體驗。

title_en: ChatGPT agent expands to Enterprise and Edu
title_zh: ChatGPT 代理服務擴展至企業版與教育版
summary_en: ChatGPT agent became available for Enterprise and Edu plans.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 代理服務已適用於企業版與教育版方案。

title_en: Image generation update to ChatGPT Free
title_zh: ChatGPT 免費版影像生成更新
summary_en: We're rolling out a small update to image generation for ChatGPT Free tier users that makes its performance more efficient.
summary_zh: 我們為 ChatGPT 免費版使用者的影像生成功能推出了一項小型更新，提升了其執行效率。

title_en: Additional connectors for Plus and Pro
title_zh: Plus 與 Pro 方案新增連接器
summary_en: Now connect even more tools in ChatGPT for useful, relevant responses in chat. The following connectors are now available to search by chat in addition to deep research. Plus: Box, Canva, Dropbox, HubSpot, Notion, Microsoft SharePoint, and Microsoft Teams Pro: Microsoft Teams and Github Rollout begins today, and all eligible accounts will have access in the coming days. To enable, visit Settings → Connectors→ Connect on the application. Note that connectors are still in beta and defaulted off for Enterprise & Edu plans.…
summary_zh: 現在可在 ChatGPT 中連接更多工具，以在對話中獲得實用且相關的回應。除了深度研究外，下列連接器現在可用於對話搜尋……

title_zh: GPT-5 更新
summary_en: You can now choose between “Auto”, “Fast”, and “Thinking” for GPT-5. Most users will want Auto, but the additional control will be useful for some people. ChatGPT Plus users now have 3,000 messages/week with GPT-5 Thinking, and then extra capacity on GPT-5 Thinking mini after that limit. The context limit for GPT-5 Thinking is 196k tokens. We may have to update rate limits over time depending on usage. 4o is back in the model picker for all paid users by default.…
summary_zh: 您現在可以為 GPT-5 選擇「自動」、「快速」或「思考」模式。大多數使用者會選擇「自動」，但額外的控制選項對部分使用者很有用。ChatGPT Plus 使用者現在每週享有 3,000 則 GPT-5 思考模式訊息，超出該限制後，可額外使用 GPT-5 思考 mini 模式。GPT-5 思考模式的上下文限制為 196k token……

title_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts Connectors in ChatGPT (Pro)
title_zh: ChatGPT (Pro) 中的 Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人連接器
summary_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts are now available to connect and use in chat. Once you enable them, ChatGPT will automatically reference them when relevant, making it faster and easier to bring information from these tools into your conversations without having to manually select them each time. This capability is part of GPT-5 and will begin rolling out to Pro users globally this week, followed by Plus, Team, Enterprise, and Edu plans in the coming weeks. To enable, visit Settings → Connectors→ Connect on the application.…
summary_zh: Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人現在可供連接並在對話中使用。啟用後，ChatGPT 將在相關時自動參考這些工具，讓您能更快速且輕鬆地將資訊帶入對話中，無需每次手動選取……

title_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts Connectors in ChatGPT (Plus)
title_zh: ChatGPT (Plus) 中的 Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人連接器
summary_en: Gmail, Google Calendar, and Google Contacts Connectors in ChatGPT are now available to Plus users globally. Access will be granted to users throughout today. This was previously made available to Pro users on August 12, 2025. Learn more about connectors.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 中的 Gmail、Google 日曆與 Google 聯絡人連接器現在已開放給全球 Plus 使用者。使用者將於今日陸續獲得存取權限。此功能先前已於 2025 年 8 月 12 日開放給 Pro 使用者。進一步了解連接器。

title_zh: GPT-5 更新
summary_en: We’re making GPT-5’s default personality warmer and more familiar. This is in response to user feedback that the initial version of GPT-5 came across as too reserved and professional. The differences in personality should feel subtle but create a noticeably more approachable ChatGPT experience. Warmth here means small acknowledgements that make interactions feel more personable — for example, “Good question,” “Great start,” or briefly recognizing the user’s circumstances when relevant.…
summary_zh: 我們調整了 GPT-5 的預設個性，使其更溫暖且親切。這是為了回應使用者反饋，指出 GPT-5 的初始版本表現得過於拘謹與專業。個性上的差異應會感到細微，但能創造出顯著更親切的 ChatGPT 體驗……

title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT Go
summary_en: We’re launching ChatGPT Go, a new low-cost subscription plan. This will initially be available for users in India only. For ₹399/month (GST included), ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows). ChatGPT Go is geo-restricted to India at launch, and is able to be subscribed to by credit card or UPI.…
summary_zh: 我們推出了一項新的低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go。此方案初期僅開放給印度使用者。ChatGPT Go 每月收費 ₹399（含 GST），提供免費版方案中的所有功能，並包含：更多訊息、更大的檔案上傳限制、更廣泛的影像生成功能、進階數據分析存取權，以及更長的記憶空間以提供更個人化的回應……

title_zh: 僅限專案記憶
summary_en: An improvement to projects is now available. When creating a project, users have the option to enable project-only memory. With project-only memory enabled, ChatGPT can use other conversations in that project for additional context, and won’t use your saved memories from outside the project to shape responses. Additionally, it won’t carry anything from the project into future chats outside of the project.…
summary_zh: 現已提供一項專案改進功能。在建立專案時，使用者可選擇啟用「僅限專案記憶」。啟用此功能後，ChatGPT 可使用該專案中的其他對話作為額外上下文，且不會使用您在專案外儲存的記憶來調整回應……

title_zh: Codex 更新 (Plus/Pro)
summary_en: Starting today, Codex works with you everywhere you build—in your terminal or IDE, on the web, in GitHub, and even from the ChatGPT iOS app. Your ChatGPT account connects it all, so you can work seamlessly between your local environment and Codex’s cloud without losing state.…
summary_zh: 即日起，Codex 可在您建構的任何地方運作，包括終端機、IDE、網頁、GitHub，甚至是 ChatGPT iOS App。您的 ChatGPT 帳號將所有服務串聯起來，讓您能在本機環境與 Codex 雲端之間無縫工作，且不會遺失狀態。

title_en: Projects Now Available on ChatGPT Free Tier
title_zh: 「專案」功能現已開放給 ChatGPT 免費版使用
summary_en: Projects bring your chats and files into one place, helping you stay focused and get things done. They’re now available on our Free tier, with up to 5 file uploads per project. We’ve also updated file uploads on paid tiers: Plus, Go, and Edu support up to 25 files per project. Pro, Business, and Enterprise support up to 40 files per project. New customization options are available for all plans, including colors and icons, to help keep your projects organized. Learn more about projects in ChatGPT.
summary_zh: 「專案」將您的對話與檔案集中於一處，助您保持專注並完成任務。此功能現已開放給免費版使用者，每個專案最多可上傳 5 個檔案。我們亦更新了付費版的檔案上傳限制：Plus、Go 與 Edu 方案每個專案支援最多 25 個檔案；Pro、Business 與 Enterprise 方案每個專案支援最多 40 個檔案。

title_zh: 網頁版對話分支功能
summary_en: You can now branch conversations in ChatGPT, making it easier to explore different directions without losing your original thread. Hover over a message, click More actions (⋯), and select Branch in new chat to start a separate conversation from that point. This feature is available today for all logged-in users on web.
summary_zh: 您現在可以在 ChatGPT 中建立對話分支，更輕鬆地探索不同方向，而不會遺失原始對話串。請將游標移至訊息上，點擊「更多動作」(⋯)，然後選擇「在新的對話中開啟分支」，即可從該點開始進行獨立的對話。此功能今日起開放給所有已登入的網頁版使用者。

title_zh: ChatGPT 語音更新
summary_en: Last month we announced that everyone now has access to Advanced Voice Mode, with usage expanded from minutes per day to hours for Free users, and near-unlimited use for Plus. We also shared that Standard Voice Mode would be retired following a 30-day sunset period. We’ve heard feedback that Standard Voice is special to some folks, and we want to make sure the transition feels right. To that end, we’re keeping Standard Voice available while we address some feedback from its users about Advanced Voice.…
summary_zh: 上個月我們宣佈所有人皆可使用「進階語音模式」，使用量限制從每天幾分鐘擴展至免費使用者每天幾小時，Plus 使用者則為近乎無限。我們同時宣告「標準語音模式」在 30 天的停用過渡期後將正式退役。

title_en: Personalization settings are now in Settings
title_zh: 個人化設定現已移至「設定」中
summary_en: Personalization no longer opens in a separate modal. You can manage personalization, choose a ChatGPT personality, add custom instructions, and update Memory directly in Settings → Personalization.
summary_zh: 個人化功能不再於獨立視窗中開啟。您可直接前往「設定」→「個人化」，管理個人化選項、選擇 ChatGPT 人格、新增自訂指令並更新「記憶」功能。

title_zh: Codex 更新 (Plus/Pro) - 推出 GPT-5-Codex
summary_en: We’re adding GPT-5-codex, a GPT-5 variant optimized for agentic coding in Codex. It’s available everywhere you use Codex: default for cloud tasks and code review, and selectable for local workflows via the Codex CLI and IDE extension. Use GPT-5-codex for coding-focused work in Codex, or Codex-like environments; use GPT-5 for general, non-coding tasks. Please review the announcement blog for more information. Note: GPT-5-Codex is not currently supported in ChatGPT or the API.…
summary_zh: 我們加入了 GPT-5-Codex，這是為 Codex 中的代理式程式開發所優化的 GPT-5 變體。它可用於您使用 Codex 的所有地方：雲端任務與程式碼審查的預設選項，並可透過 Codex CLI 與 IDE 擴充功能在本地工作流程中選用。請在 Codex 或類 Codex 環境中使用 GPT-5-Codex 進行程式開發相關工作，並使用 GPT-5 處理一般的非程式設計任務。

title_zh: ChatGPT 搜尋功能改善
summary_en: We’ve made further improvements to search in ChatGPT, making results more accurate, reliable, and useful. Factuality: Fewer hallucinations, improving answer quality. Shopping: Search is better at detecting shopping intent, showing products when you want them and keeping results focused when you don’t. Formatting: Answers are better formatted for quick understanding without losing detail or quality.
summary_zh: 我們進一步改善了 ChatGPT 的搜尋功能，使其結果更精準、可靠且實用。事實性：減少幻覺，提升回答品質。購物：搜尋功能更能偵測購物意圖，在您需要時顯示商品，並在不需要時維持結果的聚焦性。

title_en: Toggle thinking time in the message composer
title_zh: 訊息輸入框中的思考時間切換
summary_en: We’re giving Plus, Business, and Pro users more control over how long GPT-5 thinks before responding. You can now choose the level of reasoning time, so you can decide whether you want a quicker answer or more in-depth reasoning for your task. When you select GPT-5 with Thinking in ChatGPT, you’ll see a new thinking time toggle in the message composer.…
summary_zh: 我們為 Plus、Business 與 Pro 使用者提供更多對 GPT-5 回應前思考時間的控制權。您現在可選擇推理時間的長度，決定任務需要較快速的回應或是更深入的推理。當您在 ChatGPT 中選擇「GPT-5 with Thinking」時，訊息輸入框中將出現新的思考時間切換開關。

title_zh: 語音更新
summary_en: We’re improving the quality and latency of responses of the version of Advanced Voice powered by GPT-4o mini.
summary_zh: 我們提升了由 GPT-4o mini 驅動的進階語音版本之回應品質與延遲表現。

title_en: ChatGPT Go now available in Indonesia
title_zh: ChatGPT Go 現已於印尼推出
summary_en: We're launching ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, in Indonesia. For Rp 75.000/month, ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows). Learn more about ChatGPT Go.
summary_zh: 我們在印尼推出了低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go。每月 Rp 75.000，ChatGPT Go 提供免費版的所有功能，外加：更多的訊息量、更大的檔案上傳限制、擴充的影像生成功能、進階數據分析存取權，以及更長的「記憶」以提供更個人化的回應。適用於網頁、行動裝置 (iOS 與 Android) 及桌面端。

title_en: Introducing ChatGPT Pulse for Pro users
title_zh: 推出適用於 Pro 用戶的 ChatGPT Pulse
summary_en: We’re launching an early preview of ChatGPT pulse for Pro users on iOS and Android. This is a new experience where ChatGPT can now proactively deliver personalized, focused updates for you once a day. These updates are based on asynchronous research ChatGPT can do on your behalf overnight, synthesizing information from your memory, chat history, and direct feedback to learn what’s most relevant to you. Updates are delivered once a day as visual summaries you can scan at a glance or dive deeper into.…
summary_zh: 我們正在 iOS 和 Android 上推出適用於 Pro 用戶的 ChatGPT Pulse 搶先預覽版。這是一項新的體驗，ChatGPT 現在可以每天主動為您提供個人化、精準的更新。…

title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT 中的 Instant Checkout
summary_en: Instant Checkout began letting U.S. ChatGPT users buy eligible products from participating merchants without leaving the conversation.
summary_zh: Instant Checkout 開始讓美國的 ChatGPT 用戶無需離開對話即可向參與的商家購買符合條件的產品。

title_zh: 推出 Agentic Commerce Protocol
summary_en: OpenAI and Stripe introduced the open Agentic Commerce Protocol as infrastructure for merchants and agents to complete purchases while merchants remain the merchant of record.
summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Stripe 推出了開放式的 Agentic Commerce Protocol，作為商家和代理進行購買交易的基礎設施，同時商家仍保留為記錄上的賣方。

title_zh: 家長控制功能
summary_en: We’re rolling out parental controls globally in ChatGPT to help families guide how ChatGPT works in their homes. Available starting on the web today, mobile soon. To set up parental controls, a parent or guardian sends an invite to their teen to connect accounts. After the teen accepts, the parent can manage the teen’s settings from their own account. Teens can also invite a parent to connect. Once a teen is connected to a parent’s account, they automatically receive additional content protections, such as reduced graphic content and viral challenges.…
summary_zh: 我們正在全球範圍內推出 ChatGPT 家長控制功能，以協助家庭引導 ChatGPT 在家中的運作方式。今日起於網頁版開放，行動版隨後推出。若要設定家長控制，家長或監護人需發送邀請給青少年以連結帳戶。青少年接受後，家長即可從自己的帳戶管理青少年的設定。…

title_en: Sora 2 and the Sora app launch
title_zh: Sora 2 和 Sora 應用程式推出
summary_en: OpenAI released Sora 2 with more accurate physics, greater realism and control, synchronized dialogue and sound effects, and an initial U.S. and Canada rollout through a new iOS Sora app and sora.com.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 Sora 2，具有更準確的物理效果、更高的真實感與控制力、同步的對話和音效，並透過全新的 iOS Sora 應用程式和 sora.com 在美國和加拿大進行初步推廣。

title_en: Codex cloud agent becomes generally available
title_zh: Codex 雲端代理正式推出
summary_en: OpenAI moved the Codex cloud agent out of research preview and into general availability, alongside Slack and Codex SDK integrations and expanded admin controls.
summary_zh: OpenAI 將 Codex 雲端代理從研究預覽版轉為正式版，同時整合了 Slack 和 Codex SDK，並擴展了管理員控制功能。

title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT 中的應用程式
summary_en: OpenAI launched conversational apps inside ChatGPT with an initial partner set and released the Apps SDK in preview for developers to build interactive in-chat experiences.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出了對話式應用程式，並初步與合作夥伴合作，同時為開發者釋出 Apps SDK 預覽版，以建構互動式的對話體驗。
source_name: Introducing apps in ChatGPT and the new Apps SDK

title_zh: Codex 更新
summary_en: We’re rolling out new Codex capabilities to help teams work and build better: Codex now works in Slack, and supports programmatic control through the Codex SDK. Additionally, we've updated Codex rates. For more information, review our Help Center article on Codex, and the Codex developer documentation.
summary_zh: 我們正在推出新的 Codex 功能，以協助團隊更有效地工作和開發：Codex 現在可在 Slack 中運作，並透過 Codex SDK 支援程式化控制。此外，我們更新了 Codex 費率。欲了解更多資訊，請查看我們說明中心關於 Codex 的文章以及 Codex 開發者文件。

title_zh: ChatGPT Go 擴展
summary_en: We're excited to announce that ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, is now available in 16 additional countries. For an affordable price, ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows). Note: In Cambodia, Laos, and Nepal, ChatGPT Go subscriptions aren’t available in the iOS app currently.…
summary_zh: 我們宣佈，低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go 現已在另外 16 個國家/地區推出。以實惠的價格，ChatGPT Go 提供免費方案包含的所有功能，以及：更多訊息量、更大的檔案上傳限制、擴展的影像生成、存取進階資料分析、更長的記憶功能以提供更個人化的回應…

title_zh: 新增 Notion 和 Linear 同步連接器
summary_en: We're adding Notion and Linear as synced connectors (for Pro users), so you can securely bring Notion pages and Linear issues/discussions into Chat for fast answers and summaries. You can enable sync for Notion and Linear from your Connector settings (connect to Notion or Linear if you haven’t already, first). Once synced, ChatGPT will automatically reference the indexed content when relevant. Learn more about synced connectors.
summary_zh: 我們新增了 Notion 和 Linear 作為同步連接器（適用於 Pro 用戶），讓您可以安全地將 Notion 頁面和 Linear 問題/討論匯入對話中，以獲取快速的解答和摘要。您可以從「連接器」設定中啟用 Notion 和 Linear 同步（若尚未連接，請先連接 Notion 或 Linear）。…

title_zh: Slack 連接器與應用程式
summary_en: We’re rolling out two new ways to bring Slack and ChatGPT together: a connector that brings your Slack context into ChatGPT, and a ChatGPT app for Slack – an integration that enables you to chat with ChatGPT from inside Slack. With the ChatGPT app for Slack, you can chat one-on-one with ChatGPT in a dedicated Slack sidebar – a space to ask questions, summarize long threads into action items, draft replies, and search messages and files you already have access to.…
summary_zh: 我們推出兩種將 Slack 與 ChatGPT 結合的新方式：一個可將您的 Slack 上下文匯入 ChatGPT 的連接器，以及一個 Slack 的 ChatGPT 應用程式——這項整合讓您能在 Slack 內部與 ChatGPT 對話。…

title_zh: ChatGPT Go 擴展
summary_en: We're excited to announce that ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, is now available in 71 additional countries, bringing total coverage to 89 countries. For an affordable price, ChatGPT Go provides everything included in the Free plan, and: More messages, larger file uploads, and expanded image generation Access to advanced data analysis Longer memory for more personalized responses Available on web, mobile (iOS & Android), and desktop (macOS & Windows).…
summary_zh: 我們宣佈低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go 現已在 71 個額外國家/地區推出，使總覆蓋範圍達到 89 個國家/地區。…

title_en: ChatGPT can now automatically manage saved memories so it’s even better at remembering what’s important to you.
title_zh: ChatGPT 現在可以自動管理已儲存的記憶，因此它能更有效地記住對您重要的事項。
summary_en: ChatGPT now manages saved memories automatically by keeping the most relevant details prioritized and moving less important ones to the background. This helps prevent saved memories from reaching capacity and helps avoid “memory full” state in your ChatGPT account. To decide which memories stay top of mind, ChatGPT considers factors such as how recent a detail is and how often you talk about a topic. You can now also search your saved memories more easily and sort them by newest or oldest.…
summary_zh: ChatGPT 現在透過將最相關的詳細資訊保持在優先位置並將較不重要的資訊移至背景，來自動管理已儲存的記憶。這有助於防止已儲存的記憶達到容量上限，並避免 ChatGPT 帳戶出現「記憶體已滿」的狀態。…

title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT Atlas
summary_en: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Atlas, a macOS browser with ChatGPT, optional browser memories, an Ask ChatGPT sidebar, and an agent-mode preview for eligible paid users.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 ChatGPT Atlas，這是一款具備 ChatGPT、選用瀏覽器記憶功能、詢問 ChatGPT 側邊欄以及代理模式預覽功能的 macOS 瀏覽器，適用於符合資格的付費使用者。

title_zh: ChatGPT Go 擴展
summary_en: We're excited to announce that ChatGPT Go, our low cost subscription plan, is now available in 8 additional countries in Europe, bringing total coverage to 98 countries. The new countries we added are Austria, Czech Republic, Denmark, Norway, Poland, Portugal, Spain and Sweden.…
summary_zh: 我們宣佈低成本訂閱方案 ChatGPT Go 現已在歐洲 8 個額外國家/地區推出，使總覆蓋範圍達到 98 個國家/地區。新增的國家為奧地利、捷克、丹麥、挪威、波蘭、葡萄牙、西班牙和瑞典。…

title_en: Credits for Flexible Usage for Codex and Sora
title_zh: Codex 與 Sora 的彈性使用點數
summary_en: Today we’re introducing ways to purchase additional usage in products like Codex and Sora. If you hit your included limits, you can seamlessly buy more credits right in the Codex dashboard or buy more video generations in the Sora app to keep going. Learn more in our article: Using Credits for Flexible Usage in ChatGPT (Free/Go/Plus/Pro) & Sora.
summary_zh: 今天我們推出購買 Codex 與 Sora 等產品額外使用量的方法。如果您達到包含的使用上限，可以直接在 Codex 儀表板購買更多點數，或在 Sora 應用程式購買更多影片生成額度以繼續使用。在我們的文章中瞭解更多：在 ChatGPT（免費/Go/Plus/Pro）與 Sora 中使用彈性使用點數。

title_zh: ChatGPT Go 推廣活動 - 印度
summary_en: Eligible customers in India can get now get 12 months of ChatGPT Go at no cost. new New users can redeem now on ChatGPT web or the Android app (Google Play). The Apple App Store option arrives next week - no promo code is required for redemption. Available to users in India who are new, on the free plan, or are current ChatGPT Go subscribers - one redemption per account. Requires a payment method (credit card or UPI).…
summary_zh: 印度符合資格的客戶現可免費獲得 12 個月的 ChatGPT Go。新使用者現在可於 ChatGPT 網頁版或 Android 應用程式（Google Play）兌換。Apple App Store 選項將於下週推出 - 兌換時無需促銷代碼。…

title_zh: 中斷 ChatGPT
summary_en: You can now interrupt long-running queries (such as deep research or GPT-5 Pro) to refine what you’re asking—no restart required or progress lost. For example, if you're researching the perfect bookshelf and suddenly remember that your wall is 72" wide and you can't drill into it, you can simply add that information midstream by clicking “update” in the sidebar and sending the new information as a message. The model will adjust its approach based on your new requirements.
summary_zh: 您現在可以中斷長時間執行的查詢（例如深度研究或 GPT-5 Pro）以調整您的提問 - 無需重新啟動，也不會遺失進度。…

title_zh: Sora Android 版推出
summary_en: OpenAI launched the Sora Android app globally after a 28-day build, bringing prompt-based video creation to Android devices.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在經歷 28 天的開發後，全球同步推出 Sora Android 應用程式，將基於提示詞的影片創作功能帶到 Android 裝置上。
source_name: How we used Codex to build Sora for Android in 28 days

title_en: Personality and custom instructions now apply to all chats
title_zh: 個人風格與自訂指令現適用於所有聊天
summary_en: Previously, changes you made to your ChatGPT personality or custom instructions only applied to new conversations. Starting today, updates you make in Settings → Personalization are applied immediately across all chats (including existing conversations!) so your experience stays consistent everywhere without needing to start a new thread.
summary_zh: 以往，您對 ChatGPT 個人風格或自訂指令所做的變更僅適用於新的對話。從今天開始，您在「設定」→「個人化」中所做的更新會立即套用到所有聊天（包括現有的對話！），讓您的體驗在任何地方皆保持一致，無需開啟新的對話串。

title_zh: GPT-5.1 在 ChatGPT
summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5 to GPT-5.1 Instant and GPT-5.1 Thinking, making answers both smarter and more conversational. GPT-5.1 Instant now uses light adaptive reasoning for tougher questions while staying fast, and GPT-5.1 Thinking adapts its thinking time more precisely for complex tasks with clearer, less jargony responses. GPT-5.1 Auto continues to route each query to the best model, and GPT-5 models remain available for three months under the Legacy models dropdown so you can compare and transition at your own pace.…
summary_zh: 我們將 GPT-5 更新為 GPT-5.1 Instant 和 GPT-5.1 Thinking，使回答更聰明且更具對話感。GPT-5.1 Instant 針對較難的問題採用輕量級自適應推理，同時保持快速；GPT-5.1 Thinking 則能更精確地調整思考時間，以處理複雜任務，並提供更清晰、較少技術術語的回答。

title_zh: 全新的語氣與個人化控制
summary_en: We’re updating ChatGPT’s tone controls so it’s easier to make responses sound the way you prefer. You can now choose from updated presets like Default, Friendly, Efficient, Professional, Candid, and Quirky (with Cynical and Nerdy still available), and we’re experimenting with more granular controls over how concise, warm, or scannable responses are, plus how often emojis appear.…
summary_zh: 我們正在更新 ChatGPT 的語氣控制，讓您更容易使回應符合您偏好的方式。您現在可以從更新後的預設選項中選擇，例如預設 (Default)、友善 (Friendly)、高效 (Efficient)、專業 (Professional)、坦率 (Candid) 和古怪 (Quirky)（Cynical 和 Nerdy 仍然可用），我們也正在實驗針對回應的簡潔度、溫暖度或可掃描性進行更細緻的控制，此外…

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的群組聊天
summary_en: We’re piloting group chats so you can bring people - and ChatGPT - into the same conversation. Plan trips, make decisions, and collaborate on projects together while ChatGPT helps search, summarize, generate content, and keep everyone on the same page. Group chats are starting to roll out on ChatGPT Web, iOS, and Android in New Zealand, Japan, South Korea, and Taiwan. We’ll use early feedback from this pilot to improve the experience and inform how we expand to more regions and plans over time. To learn more visit the blog.
summary_zh: 我們正在試行群組聊天，讓您可以將人員和 ChatGPT 帶入同一個對話中。您可以一起規劃旅行、做出決定並協作專案，同時由 ChatGPT 協助搜尋、總結、生成內容並讓所有人保持同步。

title_en: GPT-5.1 Pro: Clearer, more capable answers for complex work
title_zh: GPT-5.1 Pro：針對複雜工作提供更清晰、更有能力的回答
summary_en: Today we’re updating GPT-5 Pro to GPT-5.1 Pro. In early testing, users consistently preferred GPT-5.1 Pro over GPT-5 Pro, rating it especially highly for writing help, data science, and business questions. Testers highlighted the model’s improved clarity, relevance, and structure in its responses. GPT-5.1 Pro is rolling out today for all ChatGPT Pro users and is available in the model picker. GPT-5 Pro will remain available as a legacy model for 90 days before being retired.
summary_zh: 今天我們將 GPT-5 Pro 更新為 GPT-5.1 Pro。在早期測試中，使用者一致偏好 GPT-5.1 Pro 勝過 GPT-5 Pro，並在寫作協助、數據科學和商業問題方面給予極高評價。測試人員強調了該模型在回應時具有更佳的清晰度、相關性和結構。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.1-Codex-Max
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.1-Codex-Max across Codex surfaces for long-running, project-scale agentic coding with native context compaction across multiple context windows.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 Codex 介面中推出了 GPT-5.1-Codex-Max，用於進行長運作、專案規模的代理式程式開發，並支援跨多個上下文視窗的原生上下文壓縮。

title_en: Instant Checkout now rolling out to Shopify merchants
title_zh: Instant Checkout 現正向 Shopify 商家推出
summary_en: You can now find and buy from Shopify merchants starting with Spanx, Skims, and Glossier through Instant Checkout in ChatGPT. When a product from a Shopify merchant supports Instant Checkout, you can complete the purchase right in the chat with a quick confirmation of your shipping and payment details. Instant Checkout is available for logged in Plus, Pro, and Free users in the US.
summary_zh: 您現在可以透過 ChatGPT 中的 Instant Checkout 尋找並購買 Shopify 商家（首波包含 Spanx、Skims 和 Glossier）的商品。當 Shopify 商家的產品支援 Instant Checkout 時，您可以在聊天中快速確認您的運送和付款詳細資訊，直接完成購買。

title_zh: 回答中包含更多圖片
summary_en: ChatGPT now adds more inline images from the web to help you quickly understand topics like well-known people, places, and products. When visuals can add clarity, you’ll see images placed beside the relevant paragraph. You can click on any of the images to see them in original dimensions and with the source attribution. These improvements are gradually rolling out globally across all ChatGPT plans, on web, iOS, and Android for responses using GPT 5.1.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 現在會在回答中增加更多來自網路的內嵌圖片，協助您快速理解知名人物、地點和產品等主題。當視覺內容能增加清晰度時，您會看到圖片放置在相關段落旁。您可以點擊任何圖片以查看原始尺寸並獲取來源說明。

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的購物研究
summary_en: Shopping research is a new interactive experience that helps you find the right products without doing all the research yourself. Describe what you need—like a quiet cordless vacuum for a small apartment, a gift for a four‑year‑old who loves art, or a way to choose between three bikes—and ChatGPT will ask clarifying questions, research deeply across the internet, review quality sources, and build on ChatGPT’s understanding of you from past conversations and memory to return a personalized buyer’s guide with options, tradeoffs, and links to buy.…
summary_zh: 購物研究是一項全新的互動式體驗，協助您找到合適的產品，而無需自己完成所有的研究。

title_en: An improved Voice interface: the audio you know, with text and visuals when you need them.
title_zh: 改進的語音介面：您熟悉的音訊，並在需要時提供文字與視覺內容
summary_en: We’re making ChatGPT Voice a seamless part of the ChatGPT experience, so you can use voice right inside the chat interface you already use every day—no separate mode required. Many of you have asked for a more flexible Voice experience—now, you can speak, listen, and see your conversation at the same time. Answers will be spoken alongside streamed text, image search results, widgets (maps, weather, etc.) and more—right in the same chat thread. This makes voice chats clearer, richer and more contextual by pairing spoken answers with visual context.…
summary_zh: 我們將 ChatGPT Voice 打造為 ChatGPT 體驗中無縫的一部分，讓您可以在每天使用的聊天介面中直接使用語音，無需切換到單獨的模式。許多使用者要求更靈活的語音體驗——現在，您可以同時說話、聆聽並查看您的對話。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.2
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.2 Instant, Thinking, and Pro in ChatGPT, with improvements for professional knowledge work, long context, agentic tool use, vision, coding, spreadsheets, and presentations.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中推出了 GPT-5.2 Instant、Thinking 和 Pro，針對專業知識工作、長上下文、代理式工具使用、視覺、程式設計、試算表和簡報功能進行了改進。

title_en: Voice on macOS desktop app is retiring (effective January 15, 2026)
title_zh: macOS 桌面版 ChatGPT 的語音功能即將停用（自 2026 年 1 月 15 日起生效）
summary_en: We’re retiring the Voice experience in the ChatGPT macOS app on January 15, 2026. This change allows us to focus on more unified and improved voice experiences across our apps. Voice will continue to be available on chatgpt.com, iOS, Android, and Windows app. No other ChatGPT features on macOS are affected.
summary_zh: 我們將於 2026 年 1 月 15 日停用 ChatGPT macOS 應用程式中的語音體驗。此舉旨在讓我們更專注於提升各應用程式中語音體驗的一致性與品質。語音功能將持續於 chatgpt.com、iOS、Android 和 Windows 應用程式中提供。其他 macOS 版 ChatGPT 功能不受影響。

title_en: ChatGPT Images on Web and Mobile (iOS & Android)
title_zh: 網頁版與行動版（iOS 與 Android）ChatGPT 影像功能
summary_en: We’ve introduced a new and improved version of ChatGPT Images, powered by our best image generation model yet. With ChatGPT Images, precise instruction following and editing makes AI image creation not just more fun, but meaningfully more useful—from everyday edits to creative transformations. All images you create with ChatGPT are automatically saved under My images at https://chatgpt.com/images, giving you a single place to browse, revisit, and reuse your work without having to sift through past conversations.…
summary_zh: 我們推出新版 ChatGPT 影像功能，由我們目前最強大的影像生成模型驅動。透過 ChatGPT Images，精確的指令遵循與編輯能力使 AI 影像創作不僅更有趣，且實用性顯著提升——從日常編輯到創意轉換皆適用。

title_zh: Pulse 現已支援「任務」功能
summary_en: Tasks let you set up automated prompts that ChatGPT can run for you. You can now manage all your tasks directly in Pulse: See all tasks in one place in Pulse. Create tasks in chat or in Pulse—whatever’s easier in the moment. Edit and review tasks in Pulse anytime after you create them. Please note that Pulse is only available in ChatGPT Pro.
summary_zh: 「任務」功能讓您能設定由 ChatGPT 為您執行的自動化提示詞。現在您可直接在 Pulse 中管理所有任務：在 Pulse 中集中檢視所有任務。隨時在對話中或 Pulse 內建立任務——依當下需求選擇。建立後可隨時在 Pulse 中編輯與檢視任務。請注意，Pulse 僅適用於 ChatGPT Pro。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.2-Codex
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.2-Codex across paid Codex surfaces with stronger long-horizon software engineering, context compaction, Windows performance, vision, and cybersecurity capabilities.
summary_zh: OpenAI 已在付費 Codex 介面中推出 GPT-5.2-Codex，具備更強大的長視角軟體工程、上下文壓縮、Windows 效能、視覺及網路安全能力。

title_en: Introducing the app directory in ChatGPT
title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT 應用程式目錄
summary_en: You can now browse and add approved apps in the new app directory. Apps let you work with your tools and data directly inside a conversation—from interactive in-chat experiences to secure connections that allow ChatGPT to search and reference information from third-party services. As part of this update, connectors now appear in the directory as apps, making it easier to manage all your tools in one place. References across the Help Center have been updated to reflect this new terminology.…
summary_zh: 您現在可在全新的應用程式目錄中瀏覽並新增經核准的應用程式。這些應用程式讓您能直接在對話中使用工具與資料——從互動式對話體驗，到允許 ChatGPT 搜尋並參照第三方服務資訊的安全連線皆包含在內。

title_zh: ChatGPT 聊天釘選功能
summary_en: You can now pin chats to the top of your list for quick access to important conversations. Pinned chats are available on iOS, Android, Web, and Atlas. On web, hover over a chat in the left-hand sidebar, click ⋯, and select Pin chat. On mobile, long-press a chat and select Pin chat.
summary_zh: 您現在可將對話釘選至清單頂端，以便快速存取重要對話。聊天釘選功能適用於 iOS、Android、網頁版及 Atlas。在網頁版上，將滑鼠懸停於左側邊欄的對話，點擊 ⋯，然後選擇「釘選聊天」。在行動裝置上，長按對話並選擇「釘選聊天」。

title_zh: 全新詳細特性控制選項
summary_en: In addition to selecting a base style and tone preset—like candid and friendly—you can now adjust specific characteristics individually. From the ‘personalization’ pane in settings, you can adjust ChatGPT to: Be more or less warm Be more or less enthusiastic Use more or fewer headers & lists Use more or fewer emojis
summary_zh: 除了選擇基礎風格與語氣預設值（如直率、友善）外，您現在可以個別調整特定特性。從設定中的「個人化」面板，您可以調整 ChatGPT 的表現：增加或減少溫暖度、增加或減少熱情度、增加或減少標題與清單的使用、增加或減少表情符號的使用。

title_zh: ChatGPT 年度回顧
summary_en: Today we’re rolling out Your Year with ChatGPT, an optional, personalized end-of-year experience that reflects on how you interacted with ChatGPT in 2025. It highlights high-level themes from your conversations and includes summary statistics about your usage over the year. This experience is rolling out gradually throughout the day, so it may not be available to everyone immediately.…
summary_zh: 我們今日推出「ChatGPT 年度回顧」，這是一項選擇性的個人化年底體驗，回顧您在 2025 年與 ChatGPT 的互動方式。它會強調您對話中的主要主題，並包含您全年的使用統計摘要。

title_zh: ChatGPT 健康功能
summary_en: We’re starting to roll out Health, a dedicated space in ChatGPT for health and wellness conversations. You can securely connect medical records, Apple Health and supported wellness apps so answers can be grounded in your own data. Health is designed to help you navigate medical care, not replace it. Health conversations, memory, and files are kept separate from the rest of ChatGPT and are not used to train our foundation models. Health appears as a new space in the ChatGPT sidebar.…
summary_zh: 我們開始推出「健康」功能，這是 ChatGPT 中專為健康與保健對話設計的空間。您可以安全地連結醫療記錄、Apple Health 及受支援的保健應用程式，讓 AI 回覆能基於您的個人資料。此功能旨在協助您了解醫療護理，而非取代醫療服務。

title_zh: 聽寫功能更新
summary_en: We’re improving our dictation capabilities in ChatGPT for all logged-in users, significantly reducing empty transcriptions and improving accuracy.
summary_zh: 我們正在改善所有已登入使用者的 ChatGPT 聽寫能力，顯著減少空轉錄並提升準確度。

title_en: Improved memory for finding details from past chats (Plus & Pro)
title_zh: 改進對過去對話細節的查找記憶功能 (Plus 與 Pro)
summary_en: When reference chat history is enabled, ChatGPT can now more reliably find specific details from your past chats when you ask. Any past chat used to answer your question now appears as a source so you can open and review the original context. This memory improvement is now available for Plus and Pro users globally.
summary_zh: 當啟用參考對話記錄時，ChatGPT 現在能更可靠地在您詢問時找到過去對話中的具體細節。任何用於回答您問題的過去對話現在都會作為來源顯示，以便您開啟並查看原始上下文。這項記憶改進功能現已向全球 Plus 和 Pro 用戶開放。

title_zh: 推出年齡預測功能
summary_en: We're rolling out an age prediction model on ChatGPT consumer plans to help determine whether an account likely belongs to someone under 18, so we can apply the right experience and safeguards for teens. The model looks at a combination of behavioral and account-level signals, including how long an account has existed, typical times of day when someone is active, usage patterns over time, and a user’s stated age.…
summary_zh: 我們正在 ChatGPT 消費者方案中推出年齡預測模型，以協助判斷帳號是否屬於 18 歲以下的使用者，進而為青少年應用合適的體驗與保護措施。

title_zh: 語音功能更新
summary_en: We’re making an update to ChatGPT Voice for paid users that improves its ability to follow user instructions, as well as fixes a bug where Voice can sometimes repeat back custom instructions.
summary_zh: 我們為付費用戶的 ChatGPT 語音功能進行了更新，提升了其遵循用戶指令的能力，並修復了語音功能偶爾會重複自訂指令的錯誤。

title_zh: 5.2 個性系統提示詞更新
summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5.2 Instant’s default personality to be more conversational and better at adapting its tone contextually, making exchanges feel smoother and more natural. You can still select a different base style and tone for ChatGPT, along with tuning characteristics like warmth and emoji use, within the Personalization menu in settings.
summary_zh: 我們正在更新 GPT-5.2 Instant 的預設個性，使其更具對話感，並能更好地根據上下文調整語氣，讓交流感覺更流暢、更自然。您仍可在設定的個人化選單中為 ChatGPT 選擇不同的基礎風格和語氣，並調整溫暖度與表情符號使用等特性。

title_en: Improvements to search response quality in Voice
title_zh: 改進語音功能的搜尋回應品質
summary_en: We’ve improved search responses in ChatGPT Voice to deliver more complete, up-to-date answers, including better access to shopping results.
summary_zh: 我們改進了 ChatGPT 語音功能中的搜尋回應，以提供更完整、更即時的答案，包括改善對購物結果的存取。

title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
title_zh: 停用 GPT-4o 及其他舊版模型
summary_en: On February 13, 2026, alongside the previously announced retirement⁠ of GPT‑5 (Instant and Thinking), we will retire GPT‑4o, GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. In the API, there are no changes at this time. For more, see our blog post or help center.
summary_zh: 於 2026 年 2 月 13 日，除了先前宣佈停用的 GPT‑5 (Instant 與 Thinking) 外，我們將從 ChatGPT 中停用 GPT‑4o、GPT‑4.1、GPT‑4.1 mini 以及 OpenAI o4-mini。API 目前沒有變動。欲了解更多資訊，請參閱我們的部落格文章或說明中心。

title_zh: 更直觀的視覺化回應
summary_en: Responses in ChatGPT are now more visual and easier to scan. For everyday questions, responses may include at-a-glance visuals—like checking your team’s latest stats, converting units, or doing a quick calculation. Answers now also highlight important people, places, products, and ideas. You can tap any highlight to open a side panel with key facts and trusted sources, making it easy to understand the context without asking follow-up questions. Rolling out globally on iOS, Android, web.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 的回應現在更具視覺效果且更易於快速瀏覽。針對日常問題，回應可能包含一目了然的視覺內容，例如查看您團隊的最新數據、單位換算或進行快速計算。回答內容現在也會突顯重要的人事物、地點、產品與概念。

title_zh: 推出 Codex 應用程式
summary_en: Today we’re releasing the Codex app for MacOS, a command center for managing multiple coding agents in parallel. The app lets you run long‑horizon and background tasks, review clean diffs from isolated worktrees, see agent progress and decisions, and execute reusable skills and automations. Available with ChatGPT plans that include Codex, with a limited‑time promo: Free and Go can try Codex with included limits, while Plus, and Pro users get 2x Codex rate limits. Get started by downloading the macOS app, and learn more about Codex.
summary_zh: 今天我們推出適用於 MacOS 的 Codex 應用程式，這是一個用於並行管理多個程式開發代理的指揮中心。該應用程式讓您能夠執行長週期與後台任務、檢視隔離工作樹中清晰的差異、查看代理的進度與決策，並執行可重複使用的技能與自動化流程。

title_en: Update on thinking time settings for GPT-5.2 Thinking in ChatGPT
title_zh: 更新 ChatGPT 中 GPT-5.2 Thinking 的思考時間設定
summary_en: Jan 10, 2026: We lowered the Standard and Light thinking time as we observed users prefer faster responses. As part of this update, the Extended thinking setting for GPT-5.2 was unintentionally changed to be lower which we have now fixed. February 3, 2026: We made another small reduction to Standard thinking time based on testing. February 4, 2026: We’re restoring the Extended thinking level for GPT-5.2 Thinking to its prior setting, correcting the inadvertent reduction from January. Extended is now back to its prior level.…
summary_zh: 2026 年 1 月 10 日：我們降低了「標準」與「輕量」思考時間，因為我們觀察到用戶偏好更快速的回應。作為此更新的一部分，GPT-5.2 的「延長」思考設定被無意間調低，我們現已修正。2026 年 2 月 3 日：根據測試，我們再次小幅縮減了「標準」思考時間。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.3-Codex
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.3-Codex across paid Codex surfaces, combining frontier agentic coding with broader reasoning and professional knowledge and allowing users to steer the model while it works.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在付費的 Codex 平台上推出 GPT-5.3-Codex，將前沿的代理式程式開發與更廣泛的推理能力及專業知識相結合，並允許用戶在模型工作時進行引導。

title_zh: 在 ChatGPT (Free, Go) 測試廣告
summary_en: We’re beginning to roll out a test for ads in ChatGPT in the U. S. for logged-in adults on the Free and Go tiers. Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Education plans do not have ads. The test will be a subset of users to start. We will expand over the coming weeks as we learn from this test. ChatGPT’s answers are generated independently from advertising. Answers are optimized based on what’s most helpful to you. When you see an ad, they are always clearly labeled as sponsored and visually separated from the organic answer.…
summary_zh: 我們開始針對美國地區使用 Free 和 Go 層級且已登入的成年使用者，對 ChatGPT 廣告進行測試。Plus、Business、Enterprise 和 Education 方案則不含廣告。測試初期將針對部分使用者開放。隨著測試進展，我們將在未來幾週內擴大測試範圍。ChatGPT 的答案生成與廣告內容無關。…

title_zh: GPT-5.2 Instant 更新
summary_en: We’re making an update to GPT-5.2 Instant in ChatGPT and the API that improves response style and quality. Users should notice responses that are more measured and grounded in tone, in a way that’s more contextually appropriate to the conversation. The model also tends to output clearer, more relevant answers to advice-seeking and how-to questions, more reliably placing the most important info upfront.
summary_zh: 我們對 ChatGPT 和 API 中的 GPT-5.2 Instant 進行了更新，以提升回應風格與品質。使用者將會發現回應的語氣更為審慎且紮實，並能更適當地貼合對話情境。…

title_zh: 深度研究功能更新
summary_en: We’re introducing improvements to deep research in ChatGPT to help produce more accurate, credible reports with greater control. You can now focus research on specific websites and a larger collection of connected apps as trusted sources. A redesigned sidebar entry point and fullscreen report view make it easier to start, review, and manage research in one place. Create and edit a research plan before it begins, and track progress with the ability to adjust direction mid-run.…
summary_zh: 我們為 ChatGPT 中的深度研究功能推出各項改進，旨在協助產出更準確、可信且具備更高控制度的報告。您現在可以將研究聚焦於特定網站，並將更多已連結的應用程式作為受信任的資訊來源。…

title_zh: ChatGPT Voice 更新
summary_en: We’re making an update to ChatGPT Voice that improves its ability to follow user instructions, and usage of tools like web search to provide better responses. This update applies to the version of Voice primarily used by those on the free ChatGPT plan, and by Plus users when limits are reached for the main model.
summary_zh: 我們對 ChatGPT Voice 進行了更新，提升其遵循使用者指令的能力，並改進對網頁搜尋等工具的使用，從而提供更優質的回應。此更新適用於主要供免費版 ChatGPT 使用者，以及在主要模型達到用量限制時供 Plus 使用者使用的 Voice 版本。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark as a Pro research preview: a smaller real-time coding model served on Cerebras hardware at more than 1,000 tokens per second.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark 作為 Pro 研究預覽版：這是一個較小型的即時程式碼模型，於 Cerebras 硬體上執行，速度超過每秒 1,000 個 token。

title_zh: 網頁版僅對話內容「全選」功能
summary_en: Cmd+A on ChatGPT web now selects conversation content without surrounding interface elements.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版的 Cmd+A 現在僅會選取對話內容，而不包含周圍的介面元素。

title_en: Expanded text and code file support
title_zh: 擴展文字與程式碼檔案支援
summary_en: ChatGPT web added support for more text, code, log, configuration, and structured-text file formats.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版增加了對更多文字、程式碼、記錄檔、設定檔和結構化文字檔案格式的支援。

title_zh: 行動版撰寫介面更新
summary_en: ChatGPT simplified the iOS and Android composer experience and exposed common tools more directly on Android.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 簡化了 iOS 和 Android 的撰寫介面體驗，並在 Android 上更直接地呈現常用工具。

title_zh: 更穩定的長對話 Thinking 模式
summary_en: Infrastructure changes reduced interruptions during long conversations that use Thinking models across web, iOS, and Android.
summary_zh: 基礎設施的變更減少了在網頁版、iOS 和 Android 上使用 Thinking 模型進行長對話時的中斷情況。

title_en: Retiring GPT-4o and other legacy models
title_zh: 停用 GPT-4o 與其他舊型模型
summary_en: As previously announced, we have retired GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT. We are also retiring GPT-5 (Instant and Thinking), as previously announced. There are no API changes at this time. For details, see our blog post and Help Center.
summary_zh: 正如先前宣布，我們已從 ChatGPT 中停用 GPT-4o、GPT-4.1、GPT-4.1 mini 和 OpenAI o4-mini。我們也如先前宣布，停用 GPT-5 (Instant 和 Thinking)。目前 API 沒有變更。詳細資訊請參閱我們的部落格文章與說明中心。

title_en: Up to 20 files per ChatGPT message
title_zh: ChatGPT 單則訊息支援最多 20 個檔案
summary_en: ChatGPT web increased the number of files that can be attached to one message from 10 to 20.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版增加單則訊息可夾帶的檔案數量，從 10 個提高至 20 個。

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的互動式程式碼區塊
summary_en: We improved Code Blocks in ChatGPT to make them more interactive. You can write, edit, and preview your code in ChatGPT, all in oneplace: Write and edit text in-line Preview diagrams and mini apps directly in chat Review code in split-screen views
summary_zh: 我們改善了 ChatGPT 中的程式碼區塊，使其更具互動性。您可以在 ChatGPT 中編寫、編輯和預覽程式碼，全部在同一個地方完成：在行內編寫和編輯文字、直接在聊天中預覽圖表和迷你應用程式、以分割視窗檢視審查程式碼。

title_zh: 擴大「思考」(Thinking) 模式的上下文視窗
summary_en: ChatGPT now has a total context window length of 256k tokens (128k input and 128k max output) when you manually select Thinking. Previously it was 196k total tokens.
summary_zh: 當您手動選擇「思考」(Thinking) 模式時，ChatGPT 的總上下文視窗長度現為 256k tokens（128k 輸入及 128k 最大輸出）。先前總計為 196k tokens。

title_en: Add sources to your projects from anywhere
title_zh: 從任何地方將來源新增至您的專案
summary_en: Projects now make it easy to build a living knowledge base by adding sources wherever your context already lives; from apps, conversations, or quick text inputs. Sources from apps: Paste a link to a Slack channel or Google Drive file or folder to add it directly as a project source. Additionally, use connected apps directly in chats. Sources from chats: Save useful ChatGPT responses into your project so great outputs become reusable knowledge. Ad-hoc text sources: Paste notes, briefs, or reference material directly to capture context instantly.…
summary_zh: 現在，透過在您現有的上下文環境中新增來源，專案能更輕鬆地建立動態知識庫；這些來源可來自應用程式、對話或快速文字輸入。來自應用程式的來源：貼上 Slack 頻道或 Google Drive 檔案或資料夾的連結，即可直接將其新增為專案來源。此外，還能直接在聊天中使用已連結的應用程式……

title_en: Edit image prompts on ChatGPT web
title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 網頁版編輯圖片提示詞
summary_en: ChatGPT web lets users edit the prompt associated with a generated image and regenerate from the revised instruction.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版允許使用者編輯與生成圖片相關的提示詞，並根據修正後的指令重新生成。

title_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版更快速的分享功能
summary_en: ChatGPT web streamlined the flow for sharing conversations.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版簡化了分享對話的流程。

title_zh: Android 版更順暢的對話體驗
summary_en: ChatGPT for Android received conversation and interface refinements intended to make interactions smoother.
summary_zh: Android 版 ChatGPT 針對對話和介面進行了改進，旨在讓互動更順暢。

title_zh: GPT-5.3 Instant 更新
summary_en: GPT‑5.3 Instant delivers more accurate answers, richer and better-contextualized results when searching the web, and reduces unnecessary dead ends, caveats, and overly declarative phrasing that can interrupt the flow of conversation. This update focuses on the parts of the ChatGPT experience people feel every day: tone, relevance, and conversational flow. These are nuanced problems that don’t always show up in benchmarks, but shape whether ChatGPT feels helpful or frustrating. GPT‑5.3 Instant directly reflects user feedback in these areas.
summary_zh: GPT-5.3 Instant 在搜尋網路時能提供更準確的答案、更豐富且具備更好上下文連結的結果，並減少不必要的死胡同、警告事項和過於斷言的措辭，這些情況可能會中斷對話流程。此更新重點在於人們日常感受到的 ChatGPT 體驗部分：語氣、相關性和對話流程……

title_zh: Windows 版 Codex 應用程式
summary_en: The Codex app is now available on Windows for ChatGPT plans that include Codex. The app gives users a Windows desktop surface for running multiple Codex agents in parallel, with isolated worktrees and reviewable diffs that can be edited, discarded, or turned into a pull request. Users can sign in with ChatGPT from the app and keep work moving across the app, CLI, and IDE without switching between tools for every task. Learn more: Using Codex with your ChatGPT plan.
summary_zh: Codex 應用程式現已在 Windows 上推出，適用於包含 Codex 的 ChatGPT 方案。該應用程式為使用者提供了一個 Windows 桌面介面，用於平行執行多個 Codex 代理，並具備可編輯、捨棄或轉為 Pull Request 的隔離工作區與可檢視的差異檔 (diffs)……

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 GPT-5.4 Thinking
summary_en: GPT‑5.4 brings together the best of our recent advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into a single frontier model. It incorporates the industry-leading coding capabilities of GPT‑5.3‑Codex⁠ while improving how the model works across tools, software environments, and professional tasks involving spreadsheets, presentations, and documents. The result is a model that gets complex real work done accurately, effectively, and efficiently—delivering what you asked for with less back and forth.…
summary_zh: GPT-5.4 將我們在推理、程式設計和代理式程式開發工作流程方面的最新進展集結至單一前沿模型中。它整合了 GPT-5.3-Codex 業界領先的程式設計能力，同時改善了模型在工具、軟體環境以及涉及試算表、簡報和文件的專業任務中的運作方式……

title_zh: 淘汰 GPT-5.1 模型
summary_en: As of March 11, 2026, GPT-5.1 models are no longer available in ChatGPT. This applies to GPT-5.1 Instant, GPT-5.1 Thinking, and GPT-5.1 Pro. Existing conversations that used GPT-5.1 will automatically continue on the corresponding current model: GPT-5.3 Instant, GPT-5.4 Thinking, or GPT-5.4 Pro.
summary_zh: 自 2026 年 3 月 11 日起，GPT-5.1 模型不再於 ChatGPT 中提供。這適用於 GPT-5.1 Instant、GPT-5.1 Thinking 和 GPT-5.1 Pro。先前使用 GPT-5.1 的對話將自動在對應的現行模型上繼續：GPT-5.3 Instant、GPT-5.4 Thinking 或 GPT-5.4 Pro。

title_zh: GPT-5.3 Instant 更新
summary_en: We’re rolling out an update to GPT-5.3 Instant that improves follow-up tone and reduces teaser-style phrasing in responses (e.g., “If you want…”, “You’ll never believe…”, “I can tell you these three things that…”).
summary_zh: 我們正在為 GPT-5.3 Instant 推出更新，改善後續語氣並減少回應中誘餌式的措辭（例如：「如果你想要……」、「你絕對想不到……」、「我可以告訴你這三件事……」）。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.4 mini and nano as faster, efficient models for high-volume coding, computer-use, tool-use, and subagent workloads; mini also became available in ChatGPT.
summary_zh: OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano，作為針對大量程式開發、電腦使用、工具使用和子代理工作負載更快速、高效的模型；mini 也已在 ChatGPT 中提供。

title_zh: 停止支援「Nerdy」基礎風格
summary_en: We’re sunsetting the preset Nerdy base style to simplify options and improve response quality. Users who selected it will be moved to the default personality. You can manage personality settings anytime in ChatGPT under Settings → Personalization.
summary_zh: 我們將停止支援預設的「Nerdy」基礎風格，以簡化選項並提升回應品質。曾選擇此風格的使用者將被移至預設人格。您隨時可以在 ChatGPT 的「設定」→「個人化」中管理人格設定。

title_en: Updates to the model picker in ChatGPT
title_zh: ChatGPT 模型選擇器更新
summary_en: We’ve simplified the model picker to make it easier to choose the right level of reasoning. Users on Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Edu accounts will see a set of model options depending on their plan, including: Instant – fast responses for everyday questions Thinking – deeper reasoning for more complex tasks Pro – the most advanced reasoning models The Auto functionality can be accessed by clicking Configure in the model picker menu and choosing "Auto-switch to Thinking.” This setting will automatically be on if your last chat was set to Auto.…
summary_zh: 我們簡化了模型選擇器，讓選擇合適的推理層級變得更容易。Plus、Pro、Business、Enterprise 和 Edu 帳戶的使用者將根據其方案看到一系列模型選項，包括：Instant – 針對日常問題的快速回應；Thinking – 針對更複雜任務的深度推理；Pro – 最先進的推理模型……

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 GPT-5.4 mini
summary_en: We’re rolling out GPT-5.4 mini in ChatGPT. GPT-5.4 mini is available to Free and Go users via the “Thinking” feature in the + menu. For all other users, GPT-5.4 mini is available as a rate limit fallback for GPT-5.4 Thinking. For Plus, Pro, and other paid users, GPT-5.4 mini will be used as a fallback for GPT-5.4 Thinking when rate limits are reached, helping with continued access to reasoning capabilities during high usage. Enterprise customers will retain the option to default Auto routing to GPT-5.4 mini, if preferred.…
summary_zh: 我們正在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.4 mini。Free 和 Go 使用者可透過 + 選單中的「Thinking」功能使用 GPT-5.4 mini。對於所有其他使用者，GPT-5.4 mini 可作為 GPT-5.4 Thinking 的速率限制備援選項……

title_en: Legacy deep research mode deprecation notice
title_zh: 舊版深度研究模式棄用通知
summary_en: The legacy deep research mode will be removed on Thursday, March 26, 2026. This change only affects the legacy mode; the current deep research experience will remain unchanged. Historical conversations and results will remain accessible. To learn more about deep research, see: Deep research in ChatGPT.
summary_zh: 舊版深度研究模式將於 2026 年 3 月 26 日星期四移除。此變更僅影響舊版模式；目前的深度研究體驗將保持不變。歷史對話與結果仍可存取。若要了解更多關於深度研究的資訊，請參閱：ChatGPT 中的深度研究。

title_zh: 學生版 Codex
summary_en: Codex for Students is now available for verified university students in the United States and Canada. Eligible students can claim $100 in ChatGPT credits, or 2,500 credits, to extend Codex usage beyond the limits included in ChatGPT Free, Go, Plus, and Pro. To get started, students sign in at chatgpt.com/codex/students and complete student verification through SheerID with their university email. Credits are applied automatically to the student's personal workspace, can be used in Codex, are not API credits, and expire 12 months after the grant date.…
summary_zh: 學生版 Codex 現已開放給美國和加拿大的已驗證大學生使用。符合資格的學生可領取 100 美元的 ChatGPT 點數（或 2,500 點），以擴展超出 ChatGPT Free、Go、Plus 和 Pro 所包含限制的 Codex 使用量……

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的檔案庫
