summary_en: Now, it’s easier to find, reuse, and build on your files over time. When you upload or create a file—whether it’s a PDF, spreadsheet, image, or more—it’s automatically saved to your Library. Generated images will continue to appear in the Images tab. You can quickly reference files in a chat using recent files in the composer, or browse everything you’ve uploaded in the Library tab in the sidebar. You can also ask ChatGPT about files you’ve saved (“What should I know about the document I uploaded yesterday?”) Library is available on web only.…
summary_zh: 現在，您可以更輕鬆地查找、重複使用並持續運用您的檔案。當您上傳或建立檔案（無論是 PDF、試算表、圖像或其他類型）時，它會自動儲存至您的「檔案庫」。生成的圖像將繼續出現在「圖像」標籤頁中……

title_zh: ChatGPT 購物功能更新
summary_en: We’ve improved shopping in ChatGPT to make it easier to discover, compare, and decide on products. Product results are now more visually rich, with improved detail and relevance. You can browse products in chat, refine results through conversation, and upload images to find similar items. Products can also be compared side by side with key details such as price, reviews, and features, making it easier to compare without opening multiple tabs. We’ve also improved product data coverage, freshness, and speed so results are more up to date and useful.…
summary_zh: 我們改善了 ChatGPT 中的購物體驗，讓產品探索、比較與決策變得更簡單。產品結果現在更具視覺豐富度，並提升了細節與相關性。您可以在對話中瀏覽產品、透過對話優化搜尋結果，並上傳圖像以尋找類似商品……

title_zh: Google Drive 應用程式整合
summary_en: Google’s file connectors in ChatGPT are now unified under Google Drive, providing a single app experience for interacting with your Google Docs, Sheets and Slides on Google Drive. If you’re a new user, you can connect to the Google Drive app in ChatGPT to use Google Drive, Docs, Sheets, and Slides actions, removing the need to install and authenticate separate Google file apps. If you’ve already connected to the separate apps in the past, they will continue to work as normal.…
summary_zh: ChatGPT 中的 Google 檔案連接器現已整合至 Google Drive，為您提供單一應用程式體驗，以與您在 Google Drive 上的 Google 文件、試算表和簡報進行互動。…

title_en: Large pastes are now handled as attachments
title_zh: 大型貼上內容現以附件形式處理
summary_en: Starting today for ChatGPT Plus, Pro, and Business users, long pastes are handled differently in ChatGPT. If you paste more than 5k characters into the composer, ChatGPT will automatically convert the content into an attachment instead of inserting it directly into the text field. This keeps the composer cleaner and helps prevent large pastes from consuming your entire context window. You can still move the content back into the message at any time by clicking on Show in text field to convert the attachment back to a direct paste.
summary_zh: 從今日起，對於 ChatGPT Plus、Pro 和 Business 使用者，長篇貼上內容在 ChatGPT 中的處理方式有所不同。若您在編輯器中貼上超過 5k 字元，ChatGPT 將自動把內容轉換為附件，而非直接插入文字欄位。…

title_zh: 行動裝置上簡化的側邊欄
summary_en: To give you more space to view your most critical chats and projects, the sidebar menu is now simplified on iOS and Android. ChatGPT experiences available to you based on your plan and usage—like Images, Codex, Pulse, and Apps—now appear in a horizontal bar above your chats and projects.
summary_zh: 為了讓您有更多空間檢視最重要的對話與專案，iOS 和 Android 上的側邊欄選單現已簡化。根據您的方案與使用情況提供給您的 ChatGPT 體驗（如 Images、Codex、Pulse 和 Apps），現在會顯示在對話與專案上方的水平列中。

title_zh: 位置共享
summary_en: Users can now choose to share their device location so ChatGPT can provide more relevant information, such as local recommendations, news, and weather. Sharing your device location is completely optional and off until you choose to enable it. You can update device location sharing in Settings > Data Controls at any time. Enabling location sharing will also enable precise location. Precise location means ChatGPT can use your device’s specific location, such as an exact address, to provide more tailored results.…
summary_zh: 使用者現在可以選擇共享其裝置位置，以便 ChatGPT 提供更相關的資訊，例如在地推薦、新聞和天氣。共享裝置位置完全是可選的，在您選擇啟用之前預設為關閉。您可以隨時在「設定」>「資料控制」中更新裝置位置共享設定。…

title_zh: Codex 中的外掛程式
summary_en: Codex now includes a curated plugins directory that lets users discover, install, and use packaged workflows built from apps and skills directly in Codex. Plugins are installable bundles for reusable Codex workflows, making it easier to share the same setup across projects or teams. Plugins can package skills, optional app integrations, and MCP server configurations in a single place. Learn more.
summary_zh: Codex 現在包含一個精選外掛程式目錄，讓使用者可以直接在 Codex 中探索、安裝並使用由應用程式與技能建立的封裝工作流程。外掛程式是可安裝的套件，用於可重複使用的 Codex 工作流程，讓跨專案或團隊共享相同的設定變得更加容易。…

title_en: Updated Box, Notion, Linear, and Dropbox apps
title_zh: 更新 Box、Notion、Linear 和 Dropbox 應用程式
summary_en: We’re rolling out updated Box, Notion, Linear, and Dropbox apps in ChatGPT. These updates add new app actions, including new write capabilities where supported, and bring the latest app experience into ChatGPT. If you already use these apps in ChatGPT, reconnect the app to start using the updated experience. Existing sync functionality (Pro users only) for these apps is not affected.
summary_zh: 我們正在 ChatGPT 中推出更新後的 Box、Notion、Linear 和 Dropbox 應用程式。這些更新增加了新的應用程式動作，包括在支援的情況下提供新的寫入功能，並將最新的應用程式體驗帶入 ChatGPT。如果您已經在 ChatGPT 中使用這些應用程式，請重新連接應用程式以開始使用更新後的體驗。…

title_zh: Apple CarPlay 中的 ChatGPT
summary_en: We’re rolling out ChatGPT in CarPlay, giving you access to a hands-free ChatGPT experience while on-the-go. If you have iOS 26.4 or newer and are connected to a supported car, you can start new voice conversations with ChatGPT directly from the CarPlay interface. You can also resume existing conversations you were having using voice mode in the ChatGPT mobile app. Learn more.
summary_zh: 我們正在 CarPlay 中推出 ChatGPT，讓您在行動中也能體驗免手持的 ChatGPT。如果您擁有 iOS 26.4 或更新版本，並連接到受支援的汽車，即可直接從 CarPlay 介面與 ChatGPT 進行新的語音對話。…

title_en: Outlook shared mailboxes and calendars in ChatGPT
title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 Outlook 共用信箱與行事曆
summary_en: The Outlook Email and Calendar apps for ChatGPT can now help with delegated or shared Outlook resources, when you have access. You can ask ChatGPT to read messages from a shared mailbox, browse its folders, mark mail read or unread, move messages, or send plain-text email from or on behalf of that mailbox. For shared Outlook calendars, ChatGPT can help create, update, RSVP to, cancel, delete, or add small attachments to events.…
summary_zh: 當您擁有存取權時，適用於 ChatGPT 的 Outlook 電子郵件與行事曆應用程式現在可以協助處理受委派或共用的 Outlook 資源。您可以要求 ChatGPT 讀取共用信箱中的郵件、瀏覽其資料夾、將郵件標記為已讀或未讀、移動郵件，或以該信箱的名義傳送純文字電子郵件。…

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的 GPT-5.3 Instant Mini
summary_en: Today, we’re releasing GPT-5.3 Instant Mini in ChatGPT. It replaces GPT-5 Instant Mini as the fallback model users reach after hitting their rate limits for GPT-5.3 Instant. Because it serves as a fallback, it won’t appear in the model picker. Compared with GPT-5 Instant Mini, GPT-5.3 Instant Mini feels more natural in conversation, with stronger writing and contextual awareness throughout chats. It outperforms GPT-5 Instant Mini across a range of use cases.
summary_zh: 今日，我們在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.3 Instant Mini。它取代了 GPT-5 Instant Mini，成為使用者在達到 GPT-5.3 Instant 的速率限制後會觸發的備用模型。由於它是作為備用模型，因此不會出現在模型選擇器中。…

title_zh: 新的 Pro 方案選項
summary_en: We’re introducing a new $100/month Pro plan and updating how Codex usage works across Plus and Pro. Pro ($100/month): Built for longer, high-intensity Codex sessions. It includes unlimited access to GPT-5.4, access to GPT-5.4 Pro, and, for a limited time, up to 10x more Codex usage than Plus (up from 5X standard usage allowance). Pro ($200/month): Our highest-usage option remains available and continues on its current Codex promotion through May 31. Plus ($20/month): Plus remains best for steady, day-to-day use.…
summary_zh: 我們推出了一項每月 $100 的新 Pro 方案，並更新了 Plus 和 Pro 方案的 Codex 使用方式。Pro（每月 $100）：專為更長、高強度的 Codex 工作階段打造。包含無限存取 GPT-5.4、存取 GPT-5.4 Pro，且在限時內，Codex 的使用量比 Plus 多達 10 倍（從標準使用配額的 5 倍提升）。…

title_en: Rolling out ads in Australia, New Zealand, and Canada
title_zh: 於澳洲、紐西蘭與加拿大推出廣告
summary_en: We're beginning to rollout ads for users on Free and Go plans in Australia, New Zealand, and Canada. Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Education plans do not have ads.
summary_zh: 我們開始於澳洲、紐西蘭與加拿大的 Free 與 Go 方案用戶推出廣告。此外，Pro、Business、Enterprise 與 Education 方案不包含廣告。

title_zh: ChatGPT 推出 ChatGPT Images 2.0
summary_en: We’re introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0, our new image generation model in ChatGPT. ChatGPT Images 2.0 is available on all ChatGPT plans. We’re also introducing images with thinking. When given more time to think, it can plan and refine image outputs before generating them. Images with thinking is available on all paid ChatGPT plans. It is available when you select Thinking and Pro models.
summary_zh: 我們推出 ChatGPT Images 2.0，這是我們在 ChatGPT 中的新圖像生成模型。ChatGPT Images 2.0 適用於所有 ChatGPT 方案。我們也推出了具備思考能力的圖像功能。當給予更多思考時間時，它可以在生成圖像前規劃並精煉輸出。具備思考能力的圖像功能適用於所有付費 ChatGPT 方案。

title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT for Clinicians
summary_en: We’re launching ChatGPT for Clinicians, a free version of ChatGPT for verified clinicians in the United States. It’s designed to support real clinical work at the time of care, including evidence review, documentation, and medical research, with trusted clinical search, citations, reusable skills, deep research across medical literature, and support for earning CME credits on eligible clinical questions. If you already have a ChatGPT account, you can use that same account to sign up.…
summary_zh: 我們推出 ChatGPT for Clinicians，這是專為美國已驗證的臨床醫師所提供的免費版 ChatGPT。它旨在支援診療當下的實際臨床工作，包括證據審查、文件記錄與醫學研究，並具備可信的臨床搜尋、引用、可重複使用的技能、跨醫學文獻的深度研究，以及對……的支援。

title_zh: ChatGPT 推出 Fast answers
summary_en: Sometimes, you just want the right answer as quickly as possible. We’re rolling out Fast answers, a quicker way to get responses to common information-seeking questions in ChatGPT, like “Show me the Seven Wonders of the World” or “Which football team has the most super bowl titles?”When your question doesn’t require a personalized response and ChatGPT has a high-confidence answer ready, it can now respond faster while still providing a useful, in-depth answer. Fast answers do not reference your past chats or memory.…
summary_zh: 有時您只想盡快獲得正確答案。我們正在推出 Fast answers，這是 ChatGPT 中針對常見資訊尋求問題（如「向我展示世界七大奇景」或「哪支美式足球隊獲得最多超級盃冠軍？」）獲得回應的更快方式。當您的問題不需要個人化回應且 ChatGPT 擁有……時。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.5
summary_en: OpenAI released GPT-5.5 in ChatGPT and Codex for agentic coding, professional knowledge work, scientific research, and computer use; GPT-5.5 Thinking and Pro rolled out to eligible paid ChatGPT plans.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 與 Codex 中發布了 GPT-5.5，用於代理式程式開發、專業知識工作、科學研究與電腦使用；GPT-5.5 Thinking 與 Pro 已向符合資格的付費 ChatGPT 方案推出。

title_zh: 終止 Sora 產品
summary_en: OpenAI discontinued the Sora web and app experiences on April 26, 2026.
summary_zh: OpenAI 於 2026 年 4 月 26 日終止了 Sora 的網頁與應用程式體驗。
source_name: What to know about the Sora discontinuation

title_zh: ChatGPT 簡化模型選擇
summary_en: We’re making it easier to choose the right model before you send a message. Model selection now appears in the composer, so you can find and switch models from the same place where you write your prompt. We’re also moving thinking effort controls into the model picker. When you choose a Thinking or Pro model, you can select the level of thinking effort directly from the model picker. This update is available on web to ChatGPT users on Plus, Pro, and Business plans.
summary_zh: 我們讓您在發送訊息前能更輕鬆地選擇合適的模型。模型選擇現在顯示於編輯器中，因此您可以在編寫提示詞的同一個位置找到並切換模型。我們也將思考強度控制項移至模型選擇器中。

title_zh: ChatGPT 推出進階帳戶安全功能
summary_en: We’re rolling out Advanced Account Security, an optional setting for personal ChatGPT accounts that adds stronger sign-in requirements and stricter account safeguards to help reduce the risk of ATO (account take over), unauthorized access, and data exposure. With Advanced Account Security enabled, ChatGPT uses stronger sign-in methods like passkeys or compatible security keys and turns off weaker paths like password sign-in, email/SMS sign-in codes, and email-based account recovery.…
summary_zh: 我們正在推出進階帳戶安全功能，這是個人 ChatGPT 帳戶的選用設定，增加更強的登入要求與更嚴格的帳戶保護措施，以協助降低 ATO（帳戶接管）、未經授權的存取與資料外洩風險。

title_en: ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets
title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT for Excel 與 Google Sheets
summary_en: ChatGPT for Excel and Google Sheets is now available globally, bringing ChatGPT into a sidebar in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets so you can build, update, and understand spreadsheets in place. It can help with trackers, budgets, formulas, multi-tab files, scenario work, and spreadsheet cleanup, and supports Skills and apps where available. Free and Go include limited usage; Plus and Pro use the same agentic usage limits as Codex. You can purchase additional credits if you need to go beyond plan limits.…
summary_zh: ChatGPT for Excel 與 Google Sheets 現已全球發布，將 ChatGPT 帶入 Microsoft Excel 與 Google Sheets 的側邊欄中，讓您能直接建立、更新與理解試算表。它能協助處理追蹤器、預算、公式、多分頁檔案、情境工作與試算表清理，並支援可用地區的技能與應用程式。

title_zh: ChatGPT 推出 GPT-5.5 Instant
summary_en: We’re rolling out GPT-5.5 Instant as ChatGPT’s new default model. It replaces GPT-5.3 Instant for all ChatGPT users and improves everyday answers across accuracy, clarity and conciseness, image understanding, STEM questions, and when ChatGPT decides to search the web. GPT-5.5 Instant is more factually reliable, especially for prompts where accuracy matters most. It also gives tighter, more direct answers without losing useful details, asks fewer unnecessary follow-up questions, and reduces clutter like overformatting and gratuitous emojis.…
summary_zh: 我們正在將 GPT-5.5 Instant 推出為 ChatGPT 的新預設模型。它取代了所有 ChatGPT 用戶的 GPT-5.3 Instant，並提升日常回答的準確度、清晰度、簡潔度、圖像理解能力、STEM 問題以及 ChatGPT 決定搜尋網路時的表現。

title_en: Memory sources and more personalized responses in ChatGPT
title_zh: ChatGPT 的記憶來源與更個人化的回應
summary_en: Starting today, we’re rolling out memory improvements to ChatGPT Plus and Pro users that make responses more personalized, useful, and continuous over time. ChatGPT can now better pull in relevant context from your past chats, saved memories, and, where available, files and connected Gmail app, to offer more tailored ideas, recommendations, and next steps. It is also faster at searching past conversations to find the right context, so you don’t have to repeat yourself as often.…
summary_zh: 即日起，我們針對 ChatGPT Plus 與 Pro 使用者推出記憶功能優化，使回應更個人化、更有用且具持續性。ChatGPT 現在能更有效地從過往對話、已儲存的記憶，以及可用的檔案與已連結的 Gmail 應用程式中提取相關背景資訊，以提供更客製化的觀點、建議與後續步驟。

title_zh: ChatGPT 的信任聯絡人
summary_en: Over the coming weeks, we'll be rolling out trusted contact, an optional safety feature for adults with personal ChatGPT accounts. Trusted contact in ChatGPT helps you connect with a person you trust if you need additional support. You may choose your trusted contact in settings, and ChatGPT will send them an invitation to participate.…
summary_zh: 未來幾週內，我們將推出「信任聯絡人」功能，這是針對擁有個人 ChatGPT 帳戶的成人使用者所提供的選擇性安全功能。若您需要額外支援，ChatGPT 的「信任聯絡人」能協助您與信任的人聯繫。您可在設定中選擇您的信任聯絡人，ChatGPT 將會發送參與邀請給對方。

title_en: More images in answers for Free users
title_zh: 免費版使用者的答案中顯示更多圖片
summary_en: Free users in ChatGPT will now see more inline images from the web to help make visual topics easier to understand, including well-known people, places, and products. When visuals can add clarity, images may appear alongside relevant parts of an answer. You can click any image to view it at its original size and see source attribution. This is rolling out globally on web and iOS to Free users for responses using 5.5-Instant.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 的免費版使用者現在會在答案中看到更多來自網路的內嵌圖片，這有助於讓視覺主題更容易理解，包括知名人物、地點與產品。當視覺內容能增加清晰度時，圖片可能會出現在答案的相關部分旁。您可以點擊任何圖片以原始大小檢視，並查看來源標註。

title_en: Codex remote access from the ChatGPT mobile app
title_zh: 透過 ChatGPT 行動應用程式遠端存取 Codex
summary_en: Codex is now available in preview in the ChatGPT mobile app, so you can stay connected to active work from your phone while Codex continues running on the connected Mac host. From mobile, you can start or continue threads, answer questions, change direction, approve actions, review what Codex found, and move across connected hosts without stepping away from the work. That means you can keep an investigation moving, make a decision when Codex reaches a fork, or spin up a new idea before you are back at your desk.…
summary_zh: Codex 現已在 ChatGPT 行動應用程式中提供預覽版，讓您在手機上也能保持與進行中的工作連結，同時 Codex 會持續在已連結的 Mac 主機上執行。

title_en: File library expands to Free and Go users, with storage management
title_zh: 檔案庫擴展至 Free 與 Go 使用者，並新增儲存空間管理功能
summary_en: File library is expanding to Free and Go users, including to users in the European Economic Area (EEA) making it easier to find, reuse, and build on files you upload or create in ChatGPT. You can add recent files from the composer, browse saved files in Library, and ask ChatGPT about files you’ve used before, like “What should I know about the document I uploaded yesterday?”We’re also introducing storage management across plans. Storage includes files you upload and files created in ChatGPT, including documents, spreadsheets, presentations, and images.…
summary_zh: 檔案庫功能擴展至 Free 與 Go 使用者（包含歐洲經濟區 (EEA) 的使用者），讓您更輕鬆地尋找、重複使用及建立您在 ChatGPT 中上傳或產生的檔案。

title_zh: ChatGPT 的個人理財
summary_en: We’re starting to roll out a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT. Pro users in the United States can securely connect supported financial accounts, see a dashboard of where their money is going, and ask questions grounded in their financial context. Available on web and iOS, Finances lets you view spending, bills, subscriptions, net worth, and investment information in one place.…
summary_zh: 我們開始在 ChatGPT 中推出全新的個人理財體驗。美國的 Pro 使用者可以安全地連結支援的財務帳戶，查看資金流向儀表板，並根據其財務背景提問。

title_zh: macOS 版 Codex 的 Appshots 功能
summary_en: Appshots let macOS users attach an app window to a Codex task with a screenshot and available text so Codex can understand the visible work context.
summary_zh: Appshots 讓 macOS 使用者能透過螢幕截圖與可用文字，將應用程式視窗附加至 Codex 任務中，以便 Codex 理解可見的工作背景。

title_zh: Codex 瀏覽器功能改進
summary_en: Codex Browser added advanced annotations, faster asset extraction, read-only JavaScript context, improved tab grouping, less extension clutter, and reliability fixes.
summary_zh: Codex 瀏覽器新增了進階註解、更快的資產提取、唯讀 JavaScript 背景、改進的標籤頁分組、減少擴充功能雜亂，並修復了穩定性問題。

title_en: Goal mode is generally available in Codex
title_zh: 目標模式在 Codex 中全面開放
summary_en: Goal mode became generally available in the Codex app, IDE extension, and CLI for outcome-driven work with explicit success criteria.
summary_zh: 目標模式現已在 Codex 應用程式、IDE 擴充功能及 CLI 中全面開放，用於執行具有明確成功標準且以成果為導向的工作。

title_zh: Codex 的應用程式內瀏覽器註解
summary_en: Codex added more precise in-app browser annotations for styling feedback on browser-based and frontend work.
summary_zh: Codex 新增了更精確的應用程式內瀏覽器註解，以針對基於瀏覽器與前端的工作提供樣式反饋。

title_zh: Codex 鎖定電腦使用功能
summary_en: Eligible macOS Computer Use users can keep Codex working remotely after the Mac locks, within existing regional constraints.
summary_zh: 符合資格的 macOS Computer Use 使用者可以在 Mac 鎖定後，於現有區域限制內繼續遠端執行 Codex 工作。

title_en: Canvas removed from GPT-5.5 Instant and Thinking
title_zh: Canvas 自 GPT-5.5 Instant 與 Thinking 中移除
summary_en: Canvas stopped being available in GPT-5.5 Instant and GPT-5.5 Thinking as writing and coding blocks moved those workflows into chat; paid users retained temporary legacy-model access.
summary_zh: 由於寫作與程式碼區塊將這些工作流程移至聊天中，Canvas 不再支援 GPT-5.5 Instant 與 GPT-5.5 Thinking；付費使用者仍可暫時存取舊版模型。

title_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant 更新
summary_en: OpenAI updated GPT-5.5 Instant in ChatGPT and the API for more natural, readable, and better-paced practical responses with fewer overly long or bullet-heavy outputs.
summary_zh: OpenAI 更新了 ChatGPT 與 API 中的 GPT-5.5 Instant，提供更自然、易讀且節奏更好的實用回應，減少輸出過長或過多項目符號的情況。

title_zh: 退役 OpenAI o3 與 GPT-4.5
summary_en: Today, we’re continuing to retire older models with limited usage in ChatGPT so we can better serve our newer, most capable models. OpenAI o3 will be retired from ChatGPT on August 26, 2026 following a 90-day sunset period, and GPT-4.5 will be retired from ChatGPT on June 26, 2026 following a 30-day sunset period. These models are currently available to paid users only via model settings. These changes apply to ChatGPT only; there are no changes to the API.
summary_zh: 今日，我們持續退役 ChatGPT 中使用率較低的舊模型，以便更完善地服務較新且能力最強的模型。OpenAI o3 將在 90 天停止服務期後，於 2026 年 8 月 26 日自 ChatGPT 退役；GPT-4.5 則將在 30 天停止服務期後，於 2026 年 6 月 26 日自 ChatGPT 退役。

title_en: Computer Use for Codex on Windows
title_zh: Windows 上的 Codex 電腦使用功能
summary_en: Eligible Codex app users can ask Codex to see, click, and type in Windows applications while testing, debugging, and refining software.
summary_zh: 符合資格的 Codex 應用程式使用者可以要求 Codex 在測試、除錯與優化軟體時，檢視、點擊並輸入 Windows 應用程式。

title_en: Remote control for Codex on Windows
title_zh: Windows 上 Codex 的遠端控制
summary_en: Users can steer Codex work running on a Windows host from ChatGPT mobile or Codex on Mac while project files and local context remain on the host.
summary_zh: 使用者可透過 ChatGPT 行動版或 Mac 上的 Codex，操控執行於 Windows 主機上的 Codex 工作，同時專案檔案與本機上下文仍保留在該主機上。

title_zh: Codex 使用設定檔
summary_en: Codex added usage profiles to help users understand and manage how work consumes included plan capacity.
summary_zh: Codex 新增了使用設定檔，協助使用者了解並管理工作如何消耗包含的方案容量。

title_en: Find live jobs and format your resume in ChatGPT
title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中尋找即時職缺並格式化您的履歷
summary_en: ChatGPT can now help with more of the job search process, from finding relevant live roles to tailoring a resume for a specific opportunity. When you search for jobs, ChatGPT can surface live listings and freelance opportunities from sources like Indeed, Upwork, Appcast, and across the web. Results are personalized using your experience, skills, and goals to highlight roles that may be a strong fit. You can follow links to apply directly on the source sites.…
summary_zh: ChatGPT 現在可以協助處理更多求職流程，從尋找相關的即時職位到針對特定機會量身打造履歷。當您搜尋工作時，ChatGPT 可以從 Indeed、Upwork、Appcast 及網路各處列出即時職缺與自由接案機會。

title_zh: 主動帳號工作階段控制
summary_en: We’re rolling out Active sessions, a new security feature in ChatGPT that helps users review sessions associated with their account and sign out of sessions they don’t recognize. Users can now: Review first-party OpenAI sessions from Settings > Security > Active sessions, with available details such as device, app, approximate location, sign-in time, trusted-device status, and whether it is the current session Log out of individual sessions or all sessions from Active sessions Active sessions shows sessions known through session management, including…
summary_zh: 我們正推出「主動工作階段」(Active sessions)，這是 ChatGPT 的一項新安全功能，協助使用者檢視與其帳號相關聯的工作階段，並登出未識別的工作階段。

title_en: Lockdown Mode is now available to all logged-in users
title_zh: 鎖定模式現已開放給所有登入使用者
summary_en: Lockdown Mode is now available to all logged-in users across account types and workspaces. It is an optional opt-in advanced security setting that limits access to the web and external services to help reduce the risk of data exfiltration from prompt injection attacks. When Lockdown Mode is on, ChatGPT restricts network-enabled capabilities such as live web browsing, deep research, agent mode, file downloads, and some web-derived image support. Personal users can turn it on from Settings > Security.…
summary_zh: 鎖定模式 (Lockdown Mode) 現已開放給各類帳號與工作空間的所有登入使用者。這是一項可選用的進階安全設定，會限制對網路與外部服務的存取，以降低提示詞注入攻擊導致資料外洩的風險。

title_en: Memory that stays more up to date
title_zh: 記憶功能保持更即時的更新
summary_en: We’ve upgraded memory so ChatGPT can better keep your context up to date, helping responses stay more relevant. This makes memory more useful by reducing stale or contradictory saved memories and helps ChatGPT better understand your preferences, goals, and ongoing work. You can review the memories that ChatGPT may use to personalize responses through sources or in your memory summary.…
summary_zh: 我們升級了記憶功能，讓 ChatGPT 能更即時地更新您的背景資訊，有助於讓回應保持更相關。此舉減少了過時或相互矛盾的儲存記憶，使記憶功能更實用，並協助 ChatGPT 更瞭解您的偏好、目標與進行中的工作。

title_en: Rolling out ads in the UK
title_zh: 於英國推出廣告
summary_en: We're beginning to roll out ads for users on Free and Go plans in the UK. Plus, Pro, Business, Enterprise, and Education plans will remain ad-free.
summary_zh: 我們開始針對英國的 Free 和 Go 方案用戶推出廣告。Plus、Business、Enterprise 和 Education 方案將維持無廣告。

title_zh: 全螢幕寫作區塊
summary_en: ChatGPT writing blocks gained a full-screen editing view for longer drafting and revision work.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 寫作區塊新增了全螢幕編輯檢視，方便進行更長的草稿編寫與修改工作。

title_zh: 改善包含附件的訊息編輯功能
summary_en: ChatGPT fixed long-standing problems when editing messages that contain attachments.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 修復了編輯包含附件之訊息時長期存在的問題。

title_zh: ChatGPT 回答中的互動式圖表
summary_en: ChatGPT can turn some answers into interactive bar, line, pie, and scatter charts directly in a conversation.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 可將部分回答直接轉換為對話中的互動式長條圖、折線圖、圓餅圖與散佈圖。

title_en: Table of contents for long answers
title_zh: 長篇回答的目錄
summary_en: Long ChatGPT answers gained a navigable table of contents for faster movement between sections.
summary_zh: 長篇 ChatGPT 回答新增了可導覽的目錄，以便在各章節間快速移動。

title_en: Simplified controls in the model picker
title_zh: 模型選擇器中的簡化控制項
summary_en: We’re updating the model picker to make it easier to choose the balance of speed and reasoning effort that works best for your task. The model picker now has the following simplified options: Instant Medium High Extra High [Pro plans only] Pro Standard [Pro plans only] Pro Extended [Pro plans only] On iOS and Android, you can find the picker at the top of the conversation. On web, it appears directly in the message composer. Users have the ability to decide whether Instant auto-switches to Medium for higher reasoning when required.…
summary_zh: 我們正在更新模型選擇器，讓您可以更輕鬆地選擇最適合您任務的速度與推理力平衡。

title_zh: Codex 應用程式工作流程改進
summary_en: Codex added the /init command for an AGENTS.md scaffold, customizable macOS Dock icons, an Unread chats section, and clearer usage-limit errors.
summary_zh: Codex 新增了用於 AGENTS.md 架構的 /init 指令、可自訂的 macOS Dock 圖示、未讀對話區塊，以及更清晰的使用限制錯誤訊息。

title_zh: Codex 瀏覽器開發者模式
summary_en: Codex added an opt-in Browser developer mode with controlled Chrome DevTools Protocol access for profiling, console and network inspection, DOM and style review, and live browser debugging.
summary_zh: Codex 新增了可選用的瀏覽器開發者模式，提供受控的 Chrome DevTools Protocol 存取權，可用於效能分析、主控台與網路檢查、DOM 與樣式檢閱，以及即時瀏覽器除錯。

title_en: Rate-limit reset banking and referrals in Codex
title_zh: Codex 中的速率限制重置與推薦機制
summary_en: Eligible Plus and Pro users received one banked Codex rate-limit reset and could earn additional 30-day resets through eligible referrals.
summary_zh: 符合資格的 Plus 與 Pro 用戶獲得了一次 Codex 速率限制重置儲存額度，並可透過合規的推薦賺取額外的 30 天重置額度。

title_zh: 記憶摘要的額外控制功能
summary_en: You can now delete the memories shown on your memory summary page and turn memory off by selecting “Delete and turn off memory” from the three-dot menu. This does not delete your past chats. If you turn memory back on later, ChatGPT may create new memories from chats that remain in your chat history. This control is available to all ChatGPT users on the web and rolling out on mobile soon. To make changes to your memory summary, you can: Type what you want changed into the text box at the bottom of the memory summary, and it will update accordingly.…
summary_zh: 您現在可以刪除記憶摘要頁面上顯示的記憶，並透過三點選單選擇「刪除並關閉記憶」來關閉記憶功能。這不會刪除您過去的對話。如果您稍後重新開啟記憶功能，ChatGPT 可能會根據仍保留在對話記錄中的內容建立新的記憶。

title_zh: 停用 GPT-5.2 模型
summary_en: As of June 12, 2026, GPT-5.2 models are no longer available in ChatGPT. This applies to GPT-5.2 Instant, GPT-5.2 Thinking, and GPT-5.2 Pro. Existing conversations that used GPT-5.2 will automatically continue on the corresponding GPT-5.5 model. GPT-5.5 models remain available in ChatGPT. This retirement was previously announced with the release of GPT-5.3 Instant. Models will generally remain available in ChatGPT for 90 days after a successor is released.
summary_zh: 自 2026 年 6 月 12 日起，GPT-5.2 模型不再於 ChatGPT 中提供。這適用於 GPT-5.2 Instant、GPT-5.2 Thinking 以及 GPT-5.2 Pro。使用過 GPT-5.2 的現有對話將自動在對應的 GPT-5.5 模型上繼續。GPT-5.5 模型仍可在 ChatGPT 中使用。

title_zh: ChatGPT 中的排程任務管理
summary_en: ChatGPT added a Scheduled page for creating and managing reminders, recurring work, and monitoring tasks; monitoring can search the web and connected apps and notify users when something material changes.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增了「排程」頁面，用於建立和管理提醒、週期性工作與監控任務；監控任務可以搜尋網路及連接的應用程式，並在發生實質變更時通知使用者。

title_zh: 終止 ChatGPT Pulse
summary_en: OpenAI announced that Pulse would be sunset as proactive updates move into Scheduled Tasks; Pro users retained access for 14 days from the June 17 notice.
summary_zh: OpenAI 宣佈 Pulse 將會終止，因為主動更新功能已移至排程任務中；Pro 使用者在 6 月 17 日通知發出後，仍保留 14 天的存取權。

title_en: Android composer and tools menu update
title_zh: Android 撰寫器與工具選單更新
summary_en: ChatGPT for Android added inline mentions and an updated tools menu for Plugins.
summary_zh: Android 版 ChatGPT 新增了行內提及功能，並更新了外掛程式的工具選單。

title_zh: 應用程式權限控制
summary_en: Users can choose whether ChatGPT always asks before using connected apps, asks before changes, or asks only before important changes.
summary_zh: 使用者可以選擇 ChatGPT 在使用連接的應用程式前，是總是詢問、在變更前詢問，還是僅在重要變更前詢問。

title_en: Create a note from a response
title_zh: 從回覆中建立筆記
summary_en: ChatGPT web lets users highlight response text, continue it in a writing block, or save it to the Library.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版允許使用者反白回覆文字、在寫作區塊中接續書寫，或將其儲存至資料庫。

title_en: Faster iOS camera and photo uploads
title_zh: 更快的 iOS 相機與照片上傳速度
summary_en: ChatGPT improved the speed and smoothness of taking and uploading photos on iOS.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 改善了在 iOS 上拍攝和上傳照片的速度與流暢度。

title_zh: 一鍵對話分享
summary_en: ChatGPT web shortened conversation sharing to a one-click flow without a separate pop-up.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版將對話分享縮減為一鍵流程，無需另外開啟彈出視窗。

title_zh: Android 上的一次性模型選擇
summary_en: Paid Android users can long-press Send to choose a model for one message without changing the conversation default.
summary_zh: 付費 Android 使用者可以長按「傳送」來為單則訊息選擇模型，而無需更改該對話的預設模型。

title_zh: ChatGPT 的發音指南
summary_en: ChatGPT can provide text and audio pronunciation guidance for words in more than 60 languages across web, iOS, and Android.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 可在網頁版、iOS 和 Android 上提供超過 60 種語言的文字與語音發音指南。

title_zh: Codex 的「記錄與重播」功能
summary_en: Record & Replay is a new Codex app feature for macOS that lets eligible users demonstrate a workflow once and turn it into a reusable skill. It is useful for repetitive workflows or tasks that are easier to show than describe, such as creating a configured issue, publishing a video, or downloading a recurring report. Record & Replay requires Computer Use to be available and enabled, and initial availability excludes the European Union, UK and Switzerland. Learn more in the Record & Replay guide.
summary_zh: 「記錄與重播」是 macOS 版 Codex 應用程式的一項新功能，讓符合資格的使用者只需示範一次工作流程，即可將其轉變為可重複使用的技能。這對於重複性的工作流程，或比起描述更容易透過展示完成的任務（例如建立已設定的議題、發佈影片或下載定期報告）非常實用。…

title_zh: 統一釘選與側邊欄整理
summary_en: ChatGPT web made chats and projects pinnable from the sidebar and added options to combine Recents or group chats by project.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 網頁版現在允許從側邊欄釘選對話與專案，並新增了合併「最近對話」或依專案分組對話的選項。

title_zh: ChatGPT 的世界盃更新
summary_en: ChatGPT added a conversational World Cup experience for schedules, matchups, teams, players, country storylines, predictions, and outcome scenarios.
summary_zh: ChatGPT 新增了互動式世界盃體驗，提供賽程、對戰組合、球隊、球員、國家故事線、預測及比賽結果情境。

title_en: Large pastes are now handled as attachments for more plans
title_zh: 更多方案支援將長內容貼上處理為附件
summary_en: Starting today for ChatGPT Free and Go users, long pastes are handled differently in ChatGPT. If you paste more than 10k characters into the composer, ChatGPT will automatically convert the content into an attachment instead of inserting it directly into the text field. This keeps the composer cleaner and helps prevent large pastes from consuming your entire context window. You can still move the content back into the message at any time by clicking on Show in text field to convert the attachment back to a direct paste.…
summary_zh: 從今天起，ChatGPT Free 和 Go 使用者在貼上長內容時會有不同的處理方式。如果您在輸入框中貼上超過 1 萬個字元，ChatGPT 會自動將內容轉換為附件，而非直接插入文字欄位中。…

title_zh: GPT-5.5 Instant 更新
summary_en: We’re updating GPT-5.5 Instant, our most-used model in ChatGPT, to improve conversational quality—especially when users are making a decision, asking for advice, planning something, researching options, or shopping. The model is better at identifying the underlying goal behind a question and carrying context across multiple turns. It also follows complex instructions more reliably: when a request includes several constraints or requirements, responses are more likely to address all of them and clearly explain why a recommendation is a good fit.…
summary_zh: 我們正在更新 ChatGPT 中最常用的模型 GPT-5.5 Instant，以提升對話品質，特別是在使用者進行決策、尋求建議、規劃事物、研究選項或購物時。該模型在識別問題背後的潛在目標以及在多輪對話中延續上下文的能力有所提升。…

title_zh: Codex Remote 正式推出
summary_en: Codex Remote became generally available on all ChatGPT plans, letting mobile users start or continue work on a paired Mac or Windows host and review progress or approve actions from their phone.
summary_zh: Codex Remote 已於所有 ChatGPT 方案中正式推出，讓行動版使用者能在已配對的 Mac 或 Windows 主機上開始或繼續工作，並透過手機審閱進度或核准操作。

title_en: DigitalOcean Droplet Workspace plugin for Codex
title_zh: Codex 的 DigitalOcean Droplet 工作區外掛程式
summary_en: A new DigitalOcean Droplet Workspace plugin lets Codex provision a Droplet, configure SSH access, and connect it to the Codex app as a remote workspace.
summary_zh: 新的 DigitalOcean Droplet 工作區外掛程式可讓 Codex 部署 Droplet、設定 SSH 存取權，並將其連接至 Codex 應用程式作為遠端工作區。

title_zh: ChatGPT 的聽寫功能改進
summary_en: We’re rolling out a new speech-to-text model for dictation in ChatGPT across all plans. This is a behind-the-scenes update, so there are no changes to how you use dictation. The update improves transcription accuracy across languages and accents, including when multilingual speakers mix or switch between languages. Evaluations showed gains in Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Urdu, Vietnamese, accented English, and long-form Spanish, French, Italian, and Portuguese.…
summary_zh: 我們正在所有方案的 ChatGPT 聽寫功能中推出全新的語音轉文字模型。此更新於後台進行，因此聽寫的使用方式沒有改變。此次更新提升了跨語言和口音的轉錄準確度，包括多語言使用者混合或切換語言時的情況。…

title_en: Personal finance in ChatGPT expands to Plus users and Android
title_zh: ChatGPT 個人理財功能拓展至 Plus 使用者與 Android 平台
summary_en: The personal finance experience in ChatGPT is rolling out to Plus users in the U. S. on web and iOS. It is also now available on Android for Pro and Plus users in the U. S. Eligible users can securely connect supported financial accounts, view a dashboard of their finances, and ask ChatGPT questions grounded in their financial context
summary_zh: ChatGPT 的個人理財體驗正陸續推向美國網頁版與 iOS 版的 Plus 使用者。此外，現在也適用於美國 Android 版的 Pro 與 Plus 使用者。符合資格的使用者可安全地連結支援的金融帳戶、檢視財務儀表板，並向 ChatGPT 詢問基於其財務情境的問題。

title_zh: 停用 GPT-4.5
summary_en: As of June 26, 2026, GPT-4.5 is no longer available in ChatGPT, including for custom GPTs. Existing conversations that used GPT-4.5 can continue with GPT-5.5. This retirement was previously announced on May 28, 2026. It applies to ChatGPT only; there are no changes to the API.
summary_zh: 自 2026 年 6 月 26 日起，GPT-4.5 不再於 ChatGPT（包含自訂 GPT）中提供。使用過 GPT-4.5 的現有對話可繼續使用 GPT-5.5 進行。此停用通知先前已於 2026 年 5 月 28 日公佈。此變更僅適用於 ChatGPT，API 不受影響。

title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.5 Instant Mini
summary_en: We’re rolling out GPT-5.5 Instant Mini in ChatGPT. It replaces GPT-5.3 Instant Mini as the fallback model users reach after hitting their GPT-5.5 Instant or Auto rate limits. Because it serves as a fallback, it won’t appear in the model picker. This update does not affect the API or Codex. Compared with GPT-5.3 Instant Mini, GPT-5.5 Instant Mini better tracks evolving user intent, calibrates tone, and avoids repetitive or overly structured responses. Testing also showed stronger personalization and fewer factual issues.
summary_zh: 我們在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.5 Instant Mini。它取代 GPT-5.3 Instant Mini，成為使用者達到 GPT-5.5 Instant 或 Auto 速率限制後的後備模型。由於它作為後備模型，不會出現在模型選擇器中。此更新不影響 API 或 Codex。

title_zh: 在 ChatGPT Voice 中推出 GPT-Live-1
summary_en: We’re rolling out a new ChatGPT Voice experience. ChatGPT Voice is now powered by GPT-Live-1 for paid users and GPT-Live-1 mini for Free users. Both models can listen and speak at the same time, making turn-taking and interruptions feel more natural. GPT-Live-1 works inside a ChatGPT chat, with spoken responses appearing alongside streamed text. It can use web search and memory, show visual results through supported widgets, and work with text and images in the same conversation.…
summary_zh: 我們推出全新的 ChatGPT Voice 體驗。ChatGPT Voice 現由付費使用者的 GPT-Live-1 和免費使用者的 GPT-Live-1 mini 驅動。兩種模型皆能同時聽取與發言，使輪流對話和中斷感覺更自然。GPT-Live-1 在 ChatGPT 對話中運作，語音回應會與串流文字同時出現。

title_en: Introducing ChatGPT Sites in public beta
title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT Sites 公開測試版
summary_en: ChatGPT Sites lets you turn your work or ideas into an interactive website or lightweight app without leaving ChatGPT. You can create dashboards, project trackers, launch calendars, prototypes, internal portals, and reports, then preview and refine the result with ChatGPT before sharing it. Business and Enterprise customers already have access to Sites. Starting today, they can also publish Sites publicly and share them with anyone through a URL, expanding Sites beyond people in their workspace.…
summary_zh: ChatGPT Sites 讓您無需離開 ChatGPT，即可將您的工作或想法轉變為互動式網站或輕量級應用程式。您可以建立儀表板、專案追蹤器、發佈行事曆、原型、內部入口網站和報告，並在分享前與 ChatGPT 一起預覽與優化結果。Business 和 Enterprise 客戶已可使用 Sites。

title_zh: 推出 ChatGPT Work
summary_en: ChatGPT Work is an agent for longer, involved tasks that can research, analyze connected apps and files, and create finished documents, spreadsheets, presentations, reports, and Sites while users steer and approve important actions.
summary_zh: ChatGPT Work 是一款用於處理較長且複雜任務的代理，能夠進行研究、分析已連結的應用程式與檔案，並建立完成的文件、試算表、簡報、報告和 Sites，同時由使用者主導並批准重要動作。

title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.6 Sol
summary_en: OpenAI began rolling out GPT-5.6 Sol in ChatGPT as its flagship reasoning model for complex work across coding, research, science, cybersecurity, computer use, and design on eligible paid plans.
summary_zh: OpenAI 開始在 ChatGPT 中推出 GPT-5.6 Sol，作為適用付費方案中用於程式編碼、研究、科學、網路安全、電腦使用和設計等複雜工作的旗艦推理模型。

title_zh: 推出 GPT-5.6 模型系列
summary_en: OpenAI released the GPT-5.6 family across ChatGPT, Codex, and the API: Sol for frontier capability, Terra for intelligence-cost balance, and Luna for efficient high-volume workloads.
summary_zh: OpenAI 在 ChatGPT、Codex 和 API 中發布了 GPT-5.6 系列：Sol 用於前沿能力，Terra 用於智慧與成本平衡，Luna 用於高效的大規模工作負載。

title_en: Plugin Directory replaces the App Directory
title_zh: Plugin Directory 取代 App Directory
summary_en: OpenAI replaced ChatGPT's App Directory with the Plugin Directory. Existing app connections remain in place, while plugins can package skills, apps, and app templates for ChatGPT Work, Codex, web, and desktop workflows.
summary_zh: OpenAI 以 Plugin Directory 取代 ChatGPT 的 App Directory。現有的應用程式連結保持不變，而外掛程式可為 ChatGPT Work、Codex、網頁和桌面工作流程封裝技能、應用程式和應用程式模板。

title_zh: 停用 Atlas
summary_en: We’re deprecating Atlas as we bring browser-based agentic capabilities into ChatGPT and Codex. Atlas is scheduled to stop working on August 9, 2026. We want to make this transition as easy as possible. Before then, move any Atlas data you want to keep. Atlas browser data, including bookmarks, open tabs, and browser history, will not transfer automatically. You can export your cookies and passwords to the ChatGPT desktop app and your bookmarks to Chrome. Be sure to save any important pages or URLs from your open tabs and browser history before August 9.…
summary_zh: 我們將棄用 Atlas，並將基於瀏覽器的代理能力引入 ChatGPT 和 Codex。Atlas 預定於 2026 年 8 月 9 日停止運作。我們希望使此轉換盡可能順利。在此之前，請移動您希望保留的任何 Atlas 資料。包含書籤、開啟的分頁和瀏覽記錄在內的 Atlas 瀏覽器資料將不會自動傳輸。

title_zh: 停用 ChatGPT 中的群組對話
summary_en: Beginning July 9, users on web, iOS, and Android will no longer be able to create new group chats, turn existing conversations into group chats, or join a group chat through an invite link. Existing group chats will remain available and can continue to be used for now. When an existing group chat becomes read-only, users will retain access to the messages, files, and images already shared there. Individual ChatGPT conversations are unaffected.
summary_zh: 自 7 月 9 日起，網頁版、iOS 和 Android 使用者將無法建立新的群組對話、將現有對話轉換為群組對話，或透過邀請連結加入群組對話。現有的群組對話目前仍可繼續使用。

title_en: The new ChatGPT desktop app brings Chat, Work, and Codex together
title_zh: 全新 ChatGPT 桌面應用程式整合 Chat、Work 與 Codex
summary_en: The new ChatGPT desktop app is available globally for macOS and Windows. It combines Chat for questions and conversation, Work for research and finished deliverables, and Codex for software development in one app. On desktop, Work can use local files and desktop apps with your permission. The built-in browser lets ChatGPT gather information from websites and work with supported web-based tools and files.…
summary_zh: 全新 ChatGPT 桌面應用程式已於 macOS 與 Windows 平台全球推出。該應用程式將用於提問與對話的 Chat、用於研究與交付成品的 Work，以及用於軟體開發的 Codex 整合為單一應用程式。在桌面上，經授權後，Work 可使用本機檔案與桌面應用程式……
